sample_comments.negatives:
- leider musste wir uns für einen Frühstücksplatz anstellen ( leider High Season für Koreanische und Russische Ferienzeit)
- keine schön gestalteter Beachbereich: es gab genau 13 Stück Sonnenschirme!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!, Liegen waren alle an einem Ort zu eng aufgestellt, zu wenige Auflagen, Beachboy schaute den ganzen Tag nur ins Handy, keine Cabanen, keine Hängematten, keine Zonen für ruhesuchende Paare, keine Dusche in Liegenähe, keine aktive Sandpflege und Säuberung,..
- der Sand am Strand in Wassernähe wurde mit einem Mittel behandelt: war leicht grau eingefärbt und quitschte beim Darübergehen und färbte die Fußsohlen und Badeschuhe leicht grau!!!
- Sauberkeit: Das Frühstücksangebot ist sehr groß und auch lecker: Aber die Atmosphäre gleicht einer Mastanstalt. Wir saßen immer draußen im Terrassenbereich: Leider wurden 6 Tage lang die Böden unter den Frühstückstischen nicht gereinigt. Ebenso die Ritzen der Holztische wurden nicht gesäubert- dort liegen Zigarettenreste und Speisereste
- Reinigung: die Außenbereiche: Bodenbeläge vor den Zimmertrakten und Liften: sind schmutzig 
- Reinigungspersonal für Zimmer: scheint überfordert zu sein- bei uns wurde immer wieder mein loses Bettcover entfernt und irgendwo im Zimmer zusammengequetscht liegengelassen oder entfernt...!
- Die Kategoriepunkte werden erfüllt, aber es fehlt jedoch jene Stimmungen und Erlebnisse, die den Aufenthalt schön und besonders machen.
- Rezeption: wir kamen um 1:30h morgens vom Flughafen an- kein freundliche Hallo , keine Freundlichkeit
- Radverleih am Pool: eine wahre Katastrophe-zu viele kaputte Räder, nicht gewartet,.....zu niedrig eingestellte Sattel, kein Werkzeug vor Ort, kein Wille spürbar die Räder zu servicieren!!!!!
- Lärmschutz zu den angrenzenden Zimmern: wir hatten im Nachbarzimmer eine Familie mit Kleinkind, welches so ab 24:00h heftig schrie, war super gut zu hören....

sample_comments.title: Fabulous beach with full sunset
sample_comments.text:
The resort locates at the long beach with beautiful sunset everyday. The facilities generally are new, especially the pool is great with trees around. We stayed in a front beach cabana, its space is quite big equiped a jacuzzi tub. Cuisine in the 3 restaurants is served at fine dining price with OK taste.
Some uncomfortable items are: 
1. The toilet bowl was installed higher position for western guests which caused muscle tension to many shorter asian guests.
2. Pet control shall be taken in good care as we hit many types of bug / fly from restaurant to room, especially at night.
3. The staffs are very friendly, however they have to be trained more and more to provide a professional 5-star service, including the (deputy) managers. We sometimes felt they don't want us to spend our money on their services by very slow action or ignored response; for some orders of in-room food and beverage orders, we had to guide them on how to bring the glasses of draught beer to our room safely. Besides, although we have informed and ordered for our anniversary event 2 prior days, it seems we had to beg for their organization.
Anyway, it can be still in our choice next time as an option in low priority.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,
On behalf of the entire team at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we would like to express our sincere gratitude for choosing our hotel for your recent stay. It was a pleasure to have you as our valued guest, and we are thrilled to hear that you thoroughly enjoyed your time with us. 
We strive to provide exceptional experiences for all our guests, and your positive feedback is a testament to our commitment to customer satisfaction. We have shared your kind remarks with our entire team, who pridefully provide our guests with memorable stays. 
At Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we continuously work on enhancing our services and facilities to ensure that every stay exceeds expectations. We appreciate your valuable feedback and will take note of any suggestions you share to enhance the guest experience further. 
Best regards, 
Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Schöne Lage mit Mängel
sample_comments.positives: Die Strandlage und der Pool.
sample_comments.negatives: Herrlich inkomptentes Personal vorallem beim Frühsück. Kaum Englischkenntnissge

sample_comments.title: room for improvement
sample_comments.text: The pool and beach are beautiful, and breakfast was great. However, the room was not properly cleaned; the floor was dirty and dusty. Additionally, I noticed that the toothbrush pack was opened, and the ventilation in the toilet is poor.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Personal war nett und bemüht
sample_comments.negatives: Gartenzimmer (war ein Upgrade - wollten wir gar nicht) sehr laut und einsichtig, kein schöner Strand (Wasser dreckig), am Pool zu wenig liegen, sehr viele Kinder, Wartezeit beim Frühstück (15min Schlange), eingeschränkte Benutzung der Anlage wegen privater Feier, teilweise ist die Anlage schon in die Jahre gekommen (Rost, Poolfliesen fehlen,....) Lage schlecht da es keine Infrastruktur gibt. Ohne Auto/Motorrad kommt man nirgendwo hin. Preislich zu teuer

sample_comments.title: Enjoying the pool + ocean + sunset view.
sample_comments.text: The resort near Sonasea Night Market has a good overall feel, with a relatively large pool and clear water. I stayed for three nights; breakfast had plenty of options, but there wasn't much variation each day, and the dining area felt a bit cramped. The hotel provides several shuttle buses for airport transfers daily, but there is only one shuttle bus to and from Sonasea Night Market and Downtown each day, so I suggest enhancing this convenient service. The hotel room has enough light and a sense of space, with a terrace offering views of the pool, sea, and sunset, which was very enjoyable. However, the air conditioning needs improvement, as one might feel the airflow directed towards the head while sleeping, which is uncomfortable, and the controls cannot adjust to an ideal temperature, affecting sleep quality. It is worth mentioning that the hotel offers nurse services; when I informed the receptionist about a family member's stomach discomfort upon checking in, a nurse was promptly arranged. Upon arriving at the room, the nurse was already there, and after some communication, she provided the necessary medication, showing thoughtful service. Lastly, the beach outside the hotel has relatively large waves, so the pool might be more suitable for swimming.
sample_comments.response: Dear KA, we appreciate your comments about your recent stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the spacious pool, the room comfort with terrace views as well as especially the thoughtful nurse service. At the same time, we are grateful for your constructive feedback regarding the breakfast selection, restaurant seating, shuttle service, and room air conditioning. I will share your comments with relevant teams as we continuously strive to improve guest comfort and convenience. Sincerely, Kim Nguyen, Guest Experience Officer.
sample_comments.room_type: PREMIUM DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Schönes Hotel mit viel Luft nach oben
sample_comments.positives:
Sehr schöne und große Hotelanlage mit Pool und eigenem Strandzugang. Wir hatten die Cabana mit privatem Poolzugang gebucht. Es war traumhaft und ist den Preis wert.
Das Hotel befindet sich in einem etwas abgelegenen Hotel Resort. In ca 20 min Fußweg kann man eine Walking street erreichen, in der viele Restaurants und ein Foodmarket sind. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist sehr groß und bietet so ziemlich alles das man sich wünschen kann, man sollte aber frühzeitig zum Frühstück kommen, sonst muss man länger warten.
sample_comments.negatives:
Es wird ab dem Check-in ständig versucht einem den ALL Acor-Club aufzudrängen. Für einen Europäer der nur hin und wieder in Asien unterwegs ist, zahlt sich das allerdings nie aus. Die Getränke kosten ohne dieser Club- Mitgliedschaft 3 Mal so viel wie in anderen Hotels. Ich bin nicht bereit für eine sonst übliche Leistung noch mehr Geld zu bezahlen. Vor allem nicht für schlechtes Service.

Am Anreisetag wollen wir abends in Restaurant noch eine Kleinigkeit essen und ließen uns einen Tisch geben. Leider war das Restaurantpersonal nicht in der Lage uns innerhalb von 20 Minuten zu bedienen bzw auch nur zu fragen was wir trinken möchten. Sie waren in einem leeren Restaurant völlig überfordert. Als wir dann den Tisch und das Restaurant verlassen wollen, lief uns eine Mitarbeiterin nach weil wir noch zahlen müssten. Wir haben ihr dann erklärt, dass wir nicht bedient wurden und daher nun wieder gehen.
Von einem Pullman Hotel hätte ich mir mehr und besseren Kundenservice erwartet.

sample_comments.title: Pullman Phu Quoc
sample_comments.text: Wonderful room with a nice bathtub. My toddlers enjoyed it very much. There is a kids' club play area with a slide and toys under 4 will need a parent to be with them. The breakfast has nice selections from noodles(pho), soup, pastries, sushi, ice cream, fruit juices, to Vietnamese coffee. The swimming pool is great, and there is a vast area for toddlers! Some areas are heated too. Also, it has a private beach with a nice sunset view. Shuttle buses to and fro airport and to the town.
sample_comments.response: Dear Pamelyn, thank you very much for taking the time to share your wonderful feedback regarding your recent stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We are thrilled to hear that you and your family enjoyed your time with us from the comfortable room and bathtub to the fun-filled kids' club and toddler-friendly pool areas. It's especially gratifying to know that the variety at our breakfast spread and the relaxing private beach with sunset views added to your experience. Your kind words about our facilities, shuttle service, and overall environment are truly appreciated, and I will be sure to share them with our entire team. Feedback like yours motivates us to continue providing memorable stays for all our guests. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back soon for another enjoyable and relaxing stay.
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Prima zum entspannen und erholen
sample_comments.positives: Tolle moderne Anlage. Bietet fast alles was man von einem 5* Resort erwartet. Tolle Poolanlage auch für Kinder, Strand direkt vor der Tür ruhige Liegeplätze.
sample_comments.negatives: Leider kein AI verfügbar. Musik am Pool könnte etwas leiser sein.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: The hotel staffs so friendly and helpful. Facilities and foods were so good and wonderful. The seaside too windy to swim, but the hotel still has other activities to enjoy, such as cycling & archery, kids club for young children is awesome
sample_comments.response:
Dear Foong,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed our friendly and helpful staff, the facilities, and the food during your stay.

We look forward to welcoming you and your family back to Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort for more fun and enjoyable experiences.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Schönes Hotel mit kleinen Mängeln
sample_comments.positives: Sehr nettes und freundliches Personal. Super toller Pool und wunderschöne Anlage. Kostenfreier Flughafemshuttle und Shuttle ins Zentrum. Sehr leckeres Frühstück.
sample_comments.negatives: Unsere Suite war sehr klamm und roch muffig. Auch ein Duftspender hat keine Abhilfe geschaffen. Die Bettdecken und Kleidung war ständig leicht feucht. Daher war der Schlaf sehr unangenehm. Der Strand hat wunderschönen weißen Sand. Hatte aber sehr viel Müll um Wasser. Wir waren danach nicht wieder am Strand. Trotzdem können wir das Hotel empfehlen.

sample_comments.title: Lovely family suite
sample_comments.text:
We stayed in a family suite and the main room was very nice. Spacious and clean.
Staffs were friendly and nice. 
A bit of communication hiccups at times but manageable. 
Spa was great, had a 90-min deep tissue massage. Breakfast and food at salt and pepper restaurant were also good, however we stayed 5 nights so we did become a bit of bored of it. But it is easy to call a Grab and go visit nearby local restaurants for a change.
sample_comments.room_type: Premium Family Suite, Executive Privilege Pass,  2 Bedrooms, Resort View

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Super schöne Anlage

sample_comments.title: Ks has both advantages and disadvantages.
sample_comments.text: The male staff member who accompanied us to the airport was very enthusiastic and took care of us until we completed the check-in process. The room was comfortable, but the bathtub in room 4019 was broken and could not be used due to a water leak. I don't find the hotel location convenient as there are no amenities around. The swimming pool is designed well for families with small children, gradually transitioning from shallow to deep; my child really enjoyed the pool here. One drawback for the hotel is that there is a shuttle service to take guests to the center for entertainment, but when I checked in at 4 PM, by 5 PM when I reported to register, the staff said there were no more vehicles available. I evaluate the hotel's readiness to serve as not high. The breakfast was better than at Sheraton and Premier Residence, and the female staff member at the breakfast area was also very enthusiastic!
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Wunderschönes Hotel Erlebnis
sample_comments.positives:
Das Personal war sehr freundlich und bemüht/ engagiert auch wenn viele eine englisch Schule bekommen sollten.(nach den zahlreichen Beschwerden bei booking haben sie sich wohl das zu Herzen genommen)
Das Zimmer war sehr geschmackvoll und bequem eingerichtet.
Die Anlage und der Poolbereich sind wunderschön und gepflegt. 
Der Strandbereich ich auch sehr sauber und gepflegt. Auch die Anzahl der Liegen wurde erhöht und hat genug Plätze geboten.
MAD Cow Restaurant hat fantastisches Essen. Solch ein Essen Bzw in der Qualität sollte es überall geben.
sample_comments.negatives:
Der jacuzzi / Whirlpool riecht komisch. Die Verständigung mit manchen Mitarbeitern auch englisch ist etwas schwer. Das könnte mit einem einfachen Englischkurs mit wiederholdenden Abfragen gelöst werden.
Bei den Frühstückstischen sollte auf jedem Platz ein Set Salz Pfeffer stehen, schließlich heißt das Restaurant auch so.
Beim Frühstück wird zu schnell abgeräumt. Man muss aufpassen dass einem die Teller nicht beim verlassen des Tisches abgeräumt werden.
In den Restaurant sollte es authentische vietnamesische Speisen geben, alles was es hier gibt kann man und will man nicht im Urlaub weiter essen wie in der Heimat. Wir wurden die vietnamesischen einfach noch hochwertiger kochen um es a den standart des Hotels anzupassen. So könnte man bei der pho bo nur Rinder Filet anbieten.

sample_comments.title: Hotel with no activity after 6pm
sample_comments.text:
Beautiful rooms, sparkling clean and beautiful design.

Drawbacks - the bed is way too firm, we both found it too hard for 3 days, no activities at all after sunset ( not that before it's lively)
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Vladimir,

We would like to take this opportunity to express our heartfelt thanks for choosing to stay at Pullman Phu Quoc during your recent visit. Your presence at our hotel is greatly appreciated, and we are pleased that you had an enjoyable and comfortable stay with us.

We would also like to thank you for sharing your feedback with us regarding your hotel experience in general. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused during your stay, and we assure you that we will take steps to ensure that your future experiences with us are better.

At our hotel, we strive to provide our guests with the highest levels of hospitality and service. We sincerely appreciate your valuable feedback and look forward to welcoming you back again soon.

Warmest regards,
Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: War wunderschöne, bequeme Zimmer. Die Hotel hat sehr schöne, sehr saubere Privatstrand. Immer genug Liegebetten rundum das Pool. +Das war unsere einzige Hotel in Vietnam wo wir waren nicht aufgefordert gute Bewertung schreiben auf Booking

sample_comments.title: Great for families
sample_comments.text: Large, open resort with a great water park for younger kids
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,
We are delighted to hear that you had a wonderful stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. Your kind words and positive ratings are greatly appreciated.
It was a pleasure to have you as our guest and we hope to see you again soon. We are always striving to provide the best service and hospitality to our valued guests like you.
Thank you again for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.
Sincerely,
Xuan Nguyen 
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Entspannung pur
sample_comments.positives:
Sehr herzliche und freundliche Mitarbeitende. Der Check-In verlief schnell und hilfreich. 
Kostenlose Shuttles von/zum Flughafen und in die nächst größere Stadt. 
Die Anlage, der Pool, der Strand sind sehr ruhig, super gepflegt sowie sauber.
Das Zimmer war traumhaft, wir waren im 6. Stock in einem Premium Deluxe Zimmer mit Meerblick und Balkon. 
An der Beach Bar hat ein DJ aufgelegt und zum Entspannen eingeladen.
Fußläufig gab es Supermärkte ein Street Food Market, v.a. mit Fischspeißen. 

An zwei Abenden haben wir bei Salt & Pepper gegessen. Die Portionsgröße waren ordentlich. Die Bedienungen waren nett aber manchmal etwas zu wenig und mussten gut rennen.

Das Restaurant im obersten Stockwerk Mad Cow ist absolut empfehlenswert, die Bedienungen waren sehr zuvorkommend und aufmerksam. Unsere Bedienung hier (leider ist mir der Name entfallen) war perfekt, wir haben Empfehlungen erhalten und wurden auf das anstehende Feuerwerk hingewiesen und haben on Top noch nettes rund um Land, Leute, Kultur und Essen erhalten ein perfekter Abschluss unseres Aufenthaltes.
sample_comments.negatives:
Im Restaurant Salt & Pepper waren die Bedienungen mehr als gut ausgelastet. So kam es verständlicherweise zu verlängerten Wartezeiten bei der Bestellaufnahme und der Lieferung. Wenn Getränke nach dem Essen geliefert werden ist es ein gutes Zeichen das mehr Personal das ganze unterstützen würde da alle anwesenden Mitarbeitenden viel und schnell unterwegs waren.

Die Klimaanlage hat leider einen etwas muffigen Duft versprüht.

sample_comments.title: We love our room and the staffs
sample_comments.text: We love our room and the staffs. But for my travel experiences around the world I think your resort could do much better with some activities like a small bar counter with music RIGTH AT THE BEACH and a few tables and seats so people could do drinking and enjoy sunbath or sunset as your resort has a wonderful private beach with sunset, and actually should have one counter at the pool too ( rather than wait for the staffs to come to order ). Also there should be some outdoor tables for breakfast areas, people would love that atmosphere in the morning . All above suggestions will enlarge your F&B income, i hope there ll be some small changes for my next visit. Overall, thank you very much for a good experience there !
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,
On behalf of the entire team at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we would like to express our sincere gratitude for choosing our hotel for your recent stay. It was a pleasure to have you as our valued guest, and we are thrilled to hear that you thoroughly enjoyed your time with us. 
We strive to provide exceptional experiences for all our guests, and your positive feedback is a testament to our commitment to customer satisfaction. We have shared your kind remarks with our entire team, who pridefully provide our guests with memorable stays. 
At Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we continuously work on enhancing our services and facilities to ensure that every stay exceeds expectations. We appreciate your valuable feedback and will take note of any suggestions you share to enhance the guest experience further. 
Best regards, 
Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Aufenthalt im Hotel Pullmann Erholung pur und stressfrei. Tolles Team. DANKE

- Angebot, Vielfalt und Qualität des Frühstück und Abendessen
- Spa-Angebote und Behandlungen super
- Zimmerservice tadellos

sample_comments.title: Top Anlage
sample_comments.positives: Alles perfekt

sample_comments.title: CABANA 9001.
sample_comments.text: I had an exceptional stay at Pullman. The hotel is beautiful, well-maintained, and offers a truly relaxing atmosphere, making it the perfect setting for my honeymoon. The breakfast was excellent with a wide variety of delicious, fresh options every morning. I also thoroughly enjoyed the spa experience---it was calming, professional, and truly helped us unwind and enjoy our special time together. What made the stay even more memorable was the outstanding hospitality from all the staff. Every team member was warm, attentive, and always ready to assist with a genuine smile. Their professionalism and kindness really elevated our experience. Thank you to the entire Pullman team for making our honeymoon so special and unforgettable---we would definitely return again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Hud,

Thank you for sharing your wonderful feedback. We are truly delighted to know that your honeymoon stay with us was such a memorable and relaxing experience. It is especially rewarding to hear that you enjoyed our breakfast selection, spa experience, and the peaceful atmosphere of the resort.

Your kind words about our team mean so much to us. We are pleased to know that their warm hospitality and attentive service helped make your special occasion even more unforgettable. We would be honored to welcome you back again for many more memorable stays at Pullman Phu Quoc in the future.

Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Supervisor
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Unvergesslich und eines der schönsten Hotels die ich gesehen habe!
sample_comments.positives: Einfach alles!! Lage, Zimmer essen service einfach alles. An jeder liege lagen bereits Handtücher nicht als Reservierung sondern zum benutzen.

sample_comments.title: Family holiday
sample_comments.text:
We booked 3 rooms for 11th to 17th January 
Really lovely hotel but we have some issues 
Hot water not coming & service very very poor. Staff not understand English much 
For drinks in beach we waited 1 hour still not get than we go to beach bar 
Still I recommend this hotel to stay
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Prima strandhotel voor kort verblijf
sample_comments.positives: Strand en ontbijt
sample_comments.negatives: Prijzige restaurants. Ver vd stad.

sample_comments.title: Great hotel to stay
sample_comments.text: Great room and facilities, though bed is a bit hard.. breakfast has variety including some halal options.. kids enjoyed swimming pool which is gr8 for day and night swims..
sample_comments.response:
Dear Siti,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback with us. We're pleased to hear that you enjoyed the room and facilities, and that your children had a great time at the swimming pool. We're also glad you appreciated the breakfast variety including the halal options available. Guest comfort is very important to us, and your feedback regarding bed firmness has been noted for our team's review. Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family back for another enjoyable stay in the future Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Best regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Genoten van dit tophotel
sample_comments.positives: De algemene beleving beviel me het meest. Het personeel was ontzettend aardig en goed opgeleid waardoor je een echt vakantiegevoel krijgt. Het eten was super en het is een prachtig hotel.
sample_comments.negatives: Enige minpunt vond ik het strand van het hotel, dat was niet heel uitnodigend. Maar een stuk verder op bij Longbeach is het stand prima en ook wat gezelliger, dat is maar 5 minuten lopen. Zwembad, de bedjes en ook de service bij het zwembad is top.

sample_comments.title: Great stay in island paradise
sample_comments.text:
We loved this resort! Some highlights include complimentary bike hire to ride along the ocean front, the breakfast buffet and the pool & beach. 
Easy to get a Grab to other locations.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Elizabeth,

We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your experience. It is wonderful to hear that our complimentary outdoor activities, our flavorful buffet breakfast and our senere pool and private beach stood out during your stay. Providing a comfortable and enjoyable environment for our guests is always our focus, and your feedback means a lot to us. Thank you for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, and we hope to see you again soon.

Best regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: 朝食のペストリー、フルーツにマンゴーがあったこと
sample_comments.negatives:
・コーヒーが美味しくない
・バーやレストランのオペレーションがやや悪い（どちらも注文から10分以上経過しても飲み物が来ず）
・部屋の仕切りがないため開放感がある一方で水回りとの境目がないからか、部屋がカビ臭い、水臭いと感じるときがあった

sample_comments.title: Best holiday experience
sample_comments.text: Entire hotel was best and it will be better if there are more Indian vegetarian food options and indoor games
sample_comments.response:
Dear Deeksha,

Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We're delighted to know you enjoyed your stay and found the overall experience excellent. We also appreciate your valuable suggestions regarding more Indian vegetarian food options and additional indoor games. Your comments have been shared with our management teams for consideration as we continue to enhance our guest offerings. Thank you once again for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, and we hope to welcome you back for an even better stay in the future.
Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: 施設と朝食は100点。その他は努力が必要
sample_comments.positives:
施設が綺麗
朝食が美味しい
sample_comments.negatives:
スタッフがいまいち
ルームサービス、レストランのメニューが少なく、味も値段の割に普通
朝食は美味しいのになぜ？

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
Immaculate resort in middle of island so quite handy to busy town north and sunset town and Kem Beach south..
Had great facilities modern and clean and probably best breakfast buffet Ive eaten and fininishing at 1100 so that was great..

Now for negatives I found the bed rock hard in fact same everywhere in Vietnam 
The Aircon I'd put at max 28 and it kept dropping back to 20 so it was freezing actually woke up with worst headache of my life from it..
I informed them but staff member attends explaining up and down on control he doesn't think I have Air con in a hot country? 
The door didn't close properly and they definitely knew about it as showed me trick on closing upon check-in I came back to room numerous times and wife wasnt aware door wasnt locked
I got to be honest here I didn't find the service that great from staff some were very friendly and some werent it doesn't normally bother me but if Im paying exorbitant rates I expect the service with it..
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: 最高
sample_comments.positives:
スタッフが親切で
狭いから行き届いてたいろいろ
sample_comments.negatives: なし

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The exterior felt older than I imagined, but the inside of the room was clean, and both the pool and the beach were really great! The breakfast also had a variety of options, which I enjoyed. However, there were several times when the hot water was not coming out well, and the water pressure was weak, which was disappointing. Additionally, there were times when what seemed to be dishes and leftover food from room service were left outside the room for a long time, making me worried about hygiene. The spa was so good that I would want to go again!
sample_comments.response:
Dear MINAKO,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your experience with us. We're truly glad to know you enjoyed your stay overall and appreciated our clean room, our beautiful private beach and especially relaxing experience at Pullman Spa. At the same time, we're truly sorry for the inconveniences of low hot water pressure and unclear food tray. Your feedback will be shared with our relevant team to keep refining and improving our service, to ensure a smoother experience next time. We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another effortless and enjoyable stay. Sincerely, Kim Nguyen, Guest Experience Officer.

sample_comments.title: The Pullman Resort on Puquok Island is great.
sample_comments.text:
I spent the last part of my 14-night, 15-day tour in Phu Quoc Island with 1 night at Pullman Cabana and 1 night in a suite. During that time, I moved between 7 different accommodations including hotels, resorts, apartments, and villas, and I chose Pullman Resort as the final one because I had high expectations. It's a wonderful resort hotel and I'm very satisfied with the price. 

One memorable experience was seeing a huge frog swimming in the cabana pool at night, and another was when my wife and I were having a drink on the terrace and a staff member suddenly opened the door and came in, saying it was a service and handed us chocolates, which was quite shocking. The only downside was that there was no small mart within the resort, so we had to drive out for that.

sample_comments.title: Mixed feelings
sample_comments.text:
Only a day into our visit. Not sure why Agoda ask for reviews during stays ..
Anyway, I gave three stars as I could give 5 for some things and 1 for others. 
We had a terrible first (and so far only night). That was due to a very drunk Korean female guest in next room. After 1 hour and 40 mins of noise and drama and many calls to reception, we were asked if we wanted to move as the crazy lady wouldn't. At 11.40pm. No thanks. 

That's obviously an odd situation. The handling was poor. But I have sympathy. 

A few other "nearly but not quite" moments and I'm still at 3 stars.

There are 4 more nights. I could end up hating this place or not wanting to leave. 

Wonderful location and sweet staff who mostly are doing their best.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your honest feedback with us. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share both the positive and challenging aspects of your stay.

We sincerely apologize for the disturbance you experienced on your first night. We understand how frustrating it must have been, and we're sorry that our response didn't meet your expectations in that moment. Your comfort and peace during your stay are incredibly important to us, and we will certainly review how we can better handle such situations moving forward.

We're glad to hear that you're enjoying our beautiful location and the efforts of our friendly staff, and we hope that the remainder of your stay improves. Should any further issues arise, please don't hesitate to reach out to me directly---I'm here to ensure your stay becomes the relaxing experience you deserve.

Thank you again for your understanding, and we look forward to turning your experience around in the days to come.

Warm regards,
Xuan N

sample_comments.title: Great Resort but not food is disappointing
sample_comments.text:
I recently visited the Pullman and most of the things are great about the resort. They have an excellent swimming pool, a very good and clean beach, along with well-maintained property. The only thing that disappoints is the food options for Indians and vegetarians. Most things are with Pork and Beef, which Indians do not eat, and surviving every day on bread is not possible. They should have added some curry or Paratha, or Idli option, or any indian breakfast. Even 2 items would have solved the purpose. In case they do not have indian options, adding pasta, spaghetti, and pizza could have solved this issue for vegetarians. The food was a big letdown for us.

But rooms, swimming pool, kids room for activities etc were top notch.
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: 모든 것
sample_comments.negatives: 날씨ㅠ

sample_comments.title: I had a comfortable stay for 7 nights.
sample_comments.text:
I debated whether to book a full 7-night stay... but it was really great. Of course, there were pros and cons. I arrived about an hour early, and they let me check in early. Upon entering, the cleaning state was acceptable.

I read reviews saying it was humid, and I thought, "Surely with the air conditioning running all day, why?" But there was some kind of unexplained humidity. When I turned down the air conditioning a little, my children were cold, so I only lowered the temperature by 1 degree, and it quickly became humid again. I don't know why, but I wasn't the only one who felt the humidity; my husband felt it too, so we called the staff. After they checked the air conditioning, it was a bit better, but there was definitely humidity.

Also, moms with children need to be cautious about the floor. It's not a floor that dries quickly, and after showering or using the sink, if water splashes, it's very slippery. My two-year-old daughter fell a few times. Even adults slip while wearing indoor slippers. The floor is slippery even right after cleaning. It was so bad that the cleaning staff warned to be careful because the floor was slippery after cleaning. Moms with kids might want to be attentive to this.

The breakfast was delicious! Although there weren't many varieties, it was decent for the price. Since we stayed for 7 nights, it was enough to get a bit repetitive. 

The location is quite empty; there's nothing around. It takes about 5 minutes to call a taxi to get to So Na Shi?? Although it's a distance you could walk in a place like Seoul, there were zero people walking around, and with nothing nearby to see, I wouldn't recommend walking.

The swimming pool is very spacious, and the sea is close by. The staff were friendly! We utilized the kids' club program, and it was nice that the children engaged with each other when they started to get bored. They would meet at the pool and play together, which was convenient for the moms!

On the last day, we wanted a late checkout until 2 PM. It was free until 1 PM, but when I requested another hour, they said it would be an additional 30%. I had requested a free hour for checkout the day before, but at 12 PM, they called asking why we weren't leaving. Haha, I guess it wasn't confirmed. This may vary, so it's best to check in advance.

I think we will use this place again, but probably not for 7 nights. It was good for the price! I might have listed many downsides, but I hope this helps. Our family of four was satisfied with the resort!
sample_comments.response:
Dear ranmi,

Thank you for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc for your family vacation and for taking the time to share such detailed feedback.

We are glad to hear that you appreciated the early check-in, the cleanliness of the room, the spacious pool, and the friendly staff. It is also wonderful that your children enjoyed the kids' club and made friends during their stay.

We do understand your concerns regarding the humidity and the floor slipperiness. The rainy season can indeed increase humidity levels, and we will continue to explore ways to improve guest comfort. We also appreciate your safety note about the floors and will remind our team to ensure extra care when cleaning to help prevent slipping.

Regarding breakfast, we aim to balance variety with quality, but we understand staying for several days can make it feel repetitive, and we will consider ways to keep it fresh for longer stays.

For the late check-out, we apologize for any confusion. Our policy can vary depending on occupanc

Recommended hotel to stay to experience good service & facilities. Beach was far though. Buggy service is available but can take quite a while before they have someone to drive over, probably due to resource issue.

Ocean view was great with a big balcony. Kids club was great. Recommended for family with young children.

sample_comments.title: 호캉스에 최적화된 리조트
sample_comments.positives:
조식당은 훌륭합니다. 스위트 룸을 예약해서 9층 매드카우와 1층의 조식당을 모두 이용해 보았는데, 개인적으로는 9층의 매드카우가 더 좋았던 것 같습니다.
망고빙수가 유명한데, 실제로 먹어보니 정말 맛있었습니다. 망고가 풍부하고 우유 빙수느낌에 바닐라 아이스크림을 섞은 다음 연유를 살짝 뿌린 느낌입니다. 
리조트 주변에는 아무것도 없지만 근처 TR마트는 버기카가 운행하고 있으며 산책은 리조트 앞 해변을 걷는 것으로 충분하다고 생각합니다. 저녁의 sunset이 매우 아름답습니다. 연인끼리 간 여행이라면 해변에 앉아서 함께 보는것을 추천합니다.
sample_comments.negatives:
Pullman리조트만이 아니라 근처 리조트 주변에는 아무것도 없다고 봐도 무방합니다.
리조트를 벗어나서 방문할만한 상점, 마트 등이 부족한 것이 사실입니다.
다만 리조트 내 시설이 잘 구비되어 있기 때문에, 단점이라고 할 정도는 아닙니다.

sample_comments.title: Overall satisfied!!
sample_comments.text: At first, due to a reservation issue, I couldn't get a refund for the cancellation, and the process of changing the room was very complicated and bothersome, which honestly was frustrating, but the resort facilities and the kindness of the staff were excellent. My child had gastroenteritis and was struggling to eat anything, but a local nurse who was on site came to check on his condition and even provided medication. In the restaurant, they prepared rice porridge and ginger tea for him, and continuously asked if he was feeling okay and showed concern, which touched me. If given the opportunity, I would like to visit again next time.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Im,

Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us. We are truly sorry to hear about the difficulties you faced with the initial reservation and room change process, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. We appreciate your understanding and patience in these matters.

However, we are so glad to hear that you and your family ultimately had a positive experience and that our team was able to provide support during your child's illness. It warms our hearts to know that our local nurse and restaurant staff were able to assist with care and make your child feel more comfortable during a challenging time. Your well-being is our top priority, and we're grateful to hear that their efforts made a difference.

Thank you again for your kind words about our staff and facilities. We hope that next time, you'll be able to fully enjoy your stay with us. We would be honored to welcome you and your family back to Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort in the future.

Warm reg

sample_comments.title: Stayed for a week
sample_comments.text:
Stayed here for a week, was a great base.. Spent a few days just around the hotel and a couple days exploring the island.
Note - Agoda says there is a sauna, this is not really accurate as the sauna is only available for those who do spa treatments.
Also - note the airport<>hotel transfer is not on demand, but on a fixed schedule (which means up to a 2 hour wait, we we not informed of this in advance and it wasn't a great start)
Breakfast is terrific and the staff at the breakfast restaurant are really nice.
The semi-private beach is awesome as is the pool.
If you want to enjoy water, this is a great spot to be!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Robert,

Thank you so much for sharing your feedback! We are glad to hear that you had a great week at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort and enjoyed both the hotel and the island.

We appreciate your comments about the sauna and the airport transfer, and we apologize for any confusion regarding these services. We'll make sure to update the information to better clarify the availability of the sauna and the transfer schedule, so future guests are well-informed.

It's wonderful to know that you enjoyed the breakfast, the friendly service at the breakfast restaurant, as well as the beautiful beach and pool. We take great pride in our location, and we're thrilled you were able to take advantage of the stunning water activities available here.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback, and we hope to welcome you back soon for another relaxing stay!

Warm regards,
Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Nice pool with clean rooms
sample_comments.text: We had a very nice stay with Pullman, the room was clean and the pool was so big. We loved the pool bar it is super close to the airport and the reception staff speak ok English but the other staff cannot speak that well so keep that in mind. Beach was quite empty with some rubbish around but we spent so much time at the pool so barely went to the beach. Breakfast buffet was good and they had mangos in the fridge. Overall would recommend!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Gyuhee 

We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to give your feedback regarding your recent stay at Pullman Beach Resort Phu Quoc 
We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our room and pool very much. Thank you for your precious words for the excellent service and communication skill of our reception staff. Rest assured that the compliments will reach the whole team to keep them motivated in maintaining the quality service.
The beach is severely affected by the island's harsh climate, such as strong winds and rains. Please be informed that we are now executing the necessary maintenance on all facilities at the beach to avoid the rubbish
We hope to welcome you back to improve your experience.
Best regards and safe travels,
Pieter DE WEERD | General Manager

Thân gửi Hieu,

Chúng tôi vô cùng biết ơn vì những ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách liên quan tới thời gian quý khách nghỉ tại Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. Mọi ý kiến phản hồi tích cực đều mang lại niềm vui cho chúng tôi.

Tôi sẽ chia sẻ ý kiến đóng góp của quý khách với đội ngũ nhân viên của mình. Tôi chắc chắn rằng ý kiến phản hồi này sẽ là nguồn động viên khích lệ đối với toàn bộ tập thể nhân viên của chúng tôi bởi chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực không ngừng nâng cấp chất lượng các dịch vụ của mình.

Sẽ rất tuyệt nếu quý khách có thể dành thời gian để chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình trên trang TripAdvisor của chúng tôi: https://bit.ly/ReviewAtPullmanPhuQuoc

Cảm ơn quý khách một lần nữa vì đã chia sẻ cảm nhận của quý khách và chúng tôi hy vọng chuyến đi lần tới của quý khách cũng sẽ dễ chịu như các chuyến đi trước.

Trân trọng và chúc quý khách nhiều sức khỏe,
Pieter DE WEERD | Tổng Quản Lý
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc

At Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we continuously work on enhancing our services and facilities to ensure that every stay exceeds expectations. We appreciate your valuable feedback and will take note of any suggestions you share to enhance the guest experience further.

Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Everything is perfect, so there's no need to be envious of Hawaii! Full satisfaction!
sample_comments.text:
My child loves swimming, so we booked a cabana, and it was an excellent choice! Getting around the hotel using a buggy was easy, and the yellow point main pool was beautiful, but the best part was the well-maintained private beach; I think I mentioned at least ten times that I didn't envy Hawaii at all!

Rather than going to the expensive Waikiki Beach! We kept saying how nice, pretty, and delicious it was, and that we should come back here!

Pros:
It's beautiful, luxurious, friendly, convenient, and great for photos!
Especially the life-changing mango bingsu is incredibly delicious, and the breakfast, sunset, and beach were all perfect! The best!

Cons:
The nearby area is like a desolate ghost town ;;
That's why I deducted one star for the location.
Otherwise, there are no downsides.
sample_comments.response:

At the same time, we sincerely appreciate your feedback regarding the surrounding area. While our resort is designed as a peaceful beachfront retreat, we understand your comments and will continue to support our guests with transportation options and assistance whenever needed.

sample_comments.title: Обязательно вернусь снова!!
sample_comments.positives:
Процедура заезда - быстро, четко, качественно, заселили немного раньше срока, что было очень приятно! особо хочется отметить работу персонала - с момента приезда ты находишься под полной опекой сотрудников.

Очень красивая и ухоженная территория - чистая, зеленая и хорошо продуманная, виден кропотливый труд садовников. Чистый пляж - его убирали после шторма с самого раннего утра и до позднего вечера.

Номер - выше всяких похвал. Есть все для комфортной жизни, все продумано до мелочей.

Завтрак - хороший выбор, качественная еда, четкое и внимательное обслуживание со стороны официантов и сотрудников ресторана, чистота, открытая кухня. Заказные блюда - высокая скорость обслуживания, хорошее качество, большие порции. Качественный кофе, что немаловажно, как выяснилось.

Бассейн - чистый, ухоженный, великолепно работает сервис доставки еды из ресторана, постоянно чувствуется присутствие заботливого персонала.
sample_comments.negatives: Немного тяжело было подстроиться под график уборки в номерах (только время), немного смущала шумоизоляция - постоянно слышали кашляющего и ругающегося соседа.

sample_comments.title: A good accommodation for a family vacation with kids.
sample_comments.text: This resort was chosen because it has a large swimming pool and a private beach. The swimming pool has depths ranging from very shallow to 1.4m, making it suitable for both children and adults. There was a short foam party at the pool on Wednesdays and Saturdays, which everyone enjoyed very much. The private beach has strong winds and waves, so be careful if you go in---it might feel like a free pass to the Jordan River. I would rather recommend hopping for a short time instead. The blue sky, pool water, yellow sunbed, and green beach towels make an excellent color combination for photos---any background can give you great shots. Bring pretty and colorful swimsuits instead of rash guards. I brought mosquito repellent, but there were no mosquitoes or bugs at all. Breakfast is prepared for customers from various countries and includes a wide variety of desserts (bread, fruits, drinks) that are delicious. My child said that beef pho and marshmallows were their favorites. The iced Americano I had every morning was non-acidic and nutty, which I enjoyed. If you are pouring down iced coffee from the morning, you are very likely to be Korean. I praised the mango bingsu on my blog, and while it was tasty, it wasn't stunningly delicious enough to need to eat it every day. However, I do recommend trying it at least once; the portion is enough for two people. The QR code ordering system at the pool and in the room is very convenient, and all the staff are very friendly. I wanted to give a perfect score, but I deducted two stars because the shower room and sink weren't clean. The shower room has mold, and the sink needs thorough cleaning. The water pressure wasn't weak, and there were no issues even without using a shower filter. The gym is also very clean and has a variety of equipment, so I recommend using it. Although the country is humid and both the room and bedding can feel damp, it wasn't a problem at all for living; you adapt quickly. If you call a taxi with Grab, you will arrive at the resort very quickly. The Sonasi Night Market is said to be small, but it has everything you could want and is enjoyable enough, so I recommend visiting at least once. Our whole family was satisfied, and we want to go again on our next visit to Phu Quoc.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Все было супер! Всем рекомендую!!
sample_comments.negatives: Ночью сам по себе включался телевизор.

sample_comments.title: It's pretty and perfect for a hotel stay.
sample_comments.text: Both the south and the north are easy to get around, and it's nice to receive the free pickup service from the massage shop in the city, so it's not too far to go to King Kong Mart. The view is pretty, and with the ocean, it's good for walks. The pool isn't very diverse, but it's spacious and pretty for taking photos, so I would consider coming back. I stayed on the 8th floor, and it was great to eat and have fun at Mad Cow on the 9th floor. The breakfast was crowded on days when group tours came, but on weekends without group tours, the unlimited mango breakfast was great and the food tasted good. Korean food for my parents was also well-prepared. There were various types of coffee, and it was delicious when ordered. However, the bathroom door was broken, and a child was stuck inside for 30 minutes without an apology for that. Other than that, the staff was friendly and it was clean. There are two separate sinks outside, making it convenient to use.
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Тихо, спокойно, для перезагрузки головы.
sample_comments.positives: Отель из серии Премиум. Малый номерной фонд, красивый холл, вкусные и разнообразные завтраки. Персонал отличный. Нет дискотек сельских по вечерам, как в турецких Риксос и им подобных. Отель находиться в тихом районе. Приятно погулять и прокатиться на велосипеде. Это отдых для расслабления от работы и людей, так как номерной фонд не большой. Люди все культурные. Очень мне запомнились часы проведанные на горшке японского девайса в общественном туалете)) это незабываемо) Седло с подогревом. Я был счастлив)))) Жаль такого не было в номере)) Да, и бассейн. Он очень чистый и уютный.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. Номера подустали. Ванная отличная, но уставшая. Спальная не понятно по какому принципу создавалась, но мне не хватало мягкого покрытия на полу и мебели. Прыгать с кровати в тапки не очень для меня. Коврики или мягкая зона там необходима. Пустая зона рядом с телевизором, не уютно. Балкон простой, как в тройке. Хотелось бы такие мелочи иметь в номере. Все таки он не из дешевых. 
2. Ресторан, завышен по стоимости. Их там два. На первом и последнем этаже. Если вы захотите поесть, то либо часть из того что готовят на завтраках на первом этаже , но за плату, либо дорого и в Американском стиле, грили, бургеры на 9 этаже. Еда хорошая, но дорогая и не разнообразная. 
3. Отель был заполнен на половину от силы, но в день выезда ресепшен стал торопить с выселением. Меня это очень удивило. Позвонили в 11.30, хотя я ориентировался на выезд в 12.00 и собирался. К чему такая нервозность и спешка мне не понятно. Какое то странное отношение к гостям. При заселение чай и салфетка для рук, а при выезде, торопят и такое чувство что уже и не нужен такой гость у которого закончилась бронь. Видимо не рассчитывают что он вернётся.

sample_comments.title: Great value for money, perfect for going with a baby.
sample_comments.text:
I went with my two-year-old baby.

There was a completely shallow area that was great for playing with the baby, and the food and beverage at the pool bar was really delicious. The kids' club was well set up, and the staff were very friendly and played well with the kids. They also provided beach toys and balls for sand play, which was great.

The only downside is that the bathroom and room are separated by a curtain, which gives a somewhat damp feeling... and there is a slight sense of being somewhat outdated (but it wasn't uncomfortable).

Even after checking out, we could still use all the facilities, so we continued swimming with the baby, took a nice shower at the beach house, and then the airport shuttle to the airport was perfect!
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Zip-Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.negatives: Ceny w hotelu bardzo odbiegają od cen w Wietnamie. Bardzo drogie piwo lokalne oraz przekąski w restauracji w hotelu co nie jest adekwatne do cen rynkowych . Naciąganie na Maxa turystów .

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Resort
sample_comments.text: The Pullman was absolutely beautiful to stay in. We had the executive suite with the king size bed and it was breath taking. The breakfast was incredible with a wide range of options and would definitely recommend getting the breaky included. Staff were friendly and welcoming. Unfortunately, my partner and I got sick (thankfully staying in a beautiful room!) but soon realised that we were going to pay through the nose with the resort prices for food and drinks. $20 AUD for kids serving of 10 chicken nuggets as an example. So while it is beautiful, it was expensive at the resort. But, would recommend to stay!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kate,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed your stay in the Executive Suite, and we truly appreciate your kind words about our breakfast and friendly staff.

We are sorry to hear that you and your partner fell ill during your stay, and we sincerely hope you're both feeling better now. We understand that resort pricing can sometimes be a concern, and your feedback is invaluable to us. We will continue to review our pricing and strive to offer value that complements the quality and comfort of the experience.

We truly appreciate your recommendation and hope to welcome you back for a more seamless and enjoyable stay next time.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.text: We booked Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort for our honeymoon without any high expectations but boy, it exceeded our expectations. From the moment we checked in till we left the resort after checking out, the service was exceptional. The breakfast buffet spread was one of the best I have seen and that alone deserves five stars. sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Pratelsky a ochotny personal, rozmanita snidane, bazen, restaurace u plaze, detsky klub. Celkove vynilajici servis, uklid pokoje na vysole urovni, vybaveni pokoje. Ciste pruzracne more pozvolny vstup, na plazi je mozne videt kraby. Bus zdarma na Night market, velka vyhoda. Zabava u bazenu, celkove pohodove a pratelske prostredi. Celkove krasne a stylove prostredi.Ocenil jsem moznost objednani piti a jidla primo k lehatku u bazenu pres aplikaci, aniz by clovek nekam musel jit.
sample_comments.negatives: V mori trochu plagton, obcas to lehce stipne, ale na pohodu. Mene lehatek na plazi i u bazenu. Na pokoji bych doporucil pridat elektricky odpuzovac komaru i vecer to pekne zere a je to jediny, co kazi celkovy dojem u pokoju u zahrady. Steakova restaurace byla dobra, ale interier spise normalni, jak se restaurace prezentuje, zadny wau. Jidlo dobry, ale normalni, za tu cenu a prezentaci bych si predstavoval vetsi paradu.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Sengene var gode - suiten var fin - ikke imponerende - stranden var ren men ret kedelig
sample_comments.negatives: Larmen på gangene startede kl. 7.30 - Alt for meget påtaget luksus, føltes som en pengemaskine - suiten lå lige ud til stien, hvor folk gik og kunne kigge lige ind - så ikke meget privatliv på terrassen. Alt for mange personaler forstod ikke engelsk tilstrækkeligt - service på restuaranten var ikke prangende, de kunne ikke finde ud af, at serververe maden samtidig, så vi kunne spise sammen som familien. Drikkevarer havde de havde heller ikke styr på.. Vi oplevede flere gange, at en tjener ikke lyttede eller holdt fokus, når vi bestilte. For os var det ikke et luksus ophold og eller et luksus hotel. Vi var på andre og bedre Resorts med bedre beliggenhed, flottere strand, meget mere ro og nærvær. Maden var bedre, servicen var højere - selvom prisen var næsten halv pris - Pullman var desværre ikke det ophold vi drømte om og ikke noget for os. Det var simplehen al for påtaget, så meget, at det blev irriterende...Vi kommer ikke igen...

sample_comments.title: Very disappointing for a 5 star hotel
sample_comments.positives:
First of all the whole hotel looks old, with weird room design. You have the toilet and the shower in the room without the full door, which feels like a private washroom inside the room, plus the lack of intimacy.
Other than that the hol ways of the building close to the pool and garden are not clean at all.
The main issue was with the mold in the room and a heavy smell because of that which made our stay terrible. We asked for a room change the date we arrived, but we got an air refresherner machine which stopped working during the night. The second day they offered another room but in the same building type and had the same smell, so didn't make sense to move. After that we received in the room a humidifier, which help a bit to breathe better but the smell was still there. And I saw after that other ppl complained and they blame the island humidity, but we were on other hotel in Phu Quoc which didn't have this issue, so I think is an issue with the whole building and is not property maintained or cleaned.
Also one day after the room was cleaned actually looked more dirtier, the sync and toilet was actually dirtier afterwards.

Plus the prices on bar and restaurant have western prices, but the service is far from that, and you are being charged extra for the service, where for example on the beach bar I payed 10 euros for 2 young cold coconut and I picked and was not even delivered on the beach.
Breakfast needs more vegetarian options.
Very disappointed and not close to a 5 star hotel, and will not choose Pullman anymore from now on.

The only good thing was the beach area because was quiet and not that crowded.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text:
The pool was the highlight for our boys. The kids club was great too, it gave us some time to ourselves.
Breakfast was full buffet with a variety of dishes. The kids did not want to leave the place. 
The restaurants were good but expensive.
Outside of the resort there is not much around. Vy Vy mart is about 1.1 km away if you need snacks etc for the kids.

sample_comments.negatives: Hotel building,Passage to my room, room was not like star hotel room, food quality was worst specially Indian food,Indian food was worst I ever had, I think Indian food was prepared by Vietnamese chef, we don't expect this worst quality food from a star hotel very bad experience

sample_comments.title: Absolutely near perfect for a relaxing holiday
sample_comments.text:
I stayed 4 days 3 nights in this resort. I am pretty much impressed with most aspects that this resort has to offer. 
Room is very clean, spacious with a comfortable bed and a huge bath tub. I particularly Like the electrical bidet. Room services are very easy. The room deisgn is Modern too. 

Hotels in Vietnam have improved but are still short of small details that Thai is better in, ie taking care of the scents in lobby, trendy music in lobby, welcoming towel to clean guest's hand before a welcome drink. 

Things that can be improved on : 
1. Never ask ur own guests to push their own luggage to their rooms, which should be taken care by the front desk staffs instead. I was shocked when the hotel staff brought us to our luggage and distributed our own luggage to us, so that we could push it to our room ourselves. I would say this doesn't make a good impression from the start of a guest's stay. 

2. Drinking water provided in the room should be in a plastic bottle or environmentally friend bottle instead of glass bottle for good safety reason. I dropped one of the drinking water bottle in the room and the glass bottle shattered into pieces. I had to ask for cleaning service to clean the mess. It could have been avoided if the bottle is made of plastic instead of glass. Safer for family with kids too.

3. The private beach is very good, with toys for kids provided, kayaking activity, jetski services, and photo taking corners. Cocktail drinks are served too. The only thing could have improved on is the cleanliness of the beach, which I found many plastic pieces and wastes in the sands while stepping on it may injure a person's feet if the plastic pieces are sharp. 

4. Access to breakfast buffet can be done better. Guests staying in the villa can enter the buffet area without going through the front desk staffs. This simply means some guests can even have free buffet if went unnoticed ! Some form of barrier can be placed at some entrance during buffet time to overcome
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: They have a great variety for breakfast. Very nice spread and a pho station (although pretty standard for vietnamese hotels). We tried both the main breakfast and the Mad Cow breakfast and both were very good. Mad Cow comes with specialized mains and drinks so that was a plus for us. Overall, the breakfast was up to standard.
sample_comments.negatives:
We stayed for three nights. I have to say that our experience was not what we expected . After we checked in, our fridge was not working and they were really slow to send someone to repair it. Our second sink was also not draining. The shower was not hot at all. They sent a maintenance guy the second night to come check out the temperature. The temperature never got higher than 35°C which is lower than body temperature. He was in our room for longer than 30 minutes and he acted like he fixed it and brushed it off, saying that it was the hotel policy to not let the water go higher than 38°C. Needless to say, we also didn't enjoy our jacuzzi because of the lukewarm water. 

After our first night, the hotel told us that they would change our room if we want to. We told them we would think about it to which he responded that he would have the room on standby for us. After an hour or so, we got back to him saying that we would like to make the switch. He said that the room was booked while we were considering. (Shocking). We were all packed, ready for the switch! Over promised and under delivered is our impression which is very disappointing. 

The overall facilities were fine, exactly what you would expect from a five star hotel. However, when we were at the pool, we were told to wait 20 minutes for towels. It was minor, we could wait. But the service was just not good enough for a five star hotel. The staff's English was also not great. We had to use Google translate most of the time. 

We stayed at the Movenpick hotel before Pullman and we were more satisfied with our stay there. Which is surprising considering Pullman is more expensive.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The crew here are very friendly and helpful. They are very courteous and attend to all our needs. The buffet breakfast is lovely especially their local vietnamese food.
sample_comments.response:

It was a pleasure to have you as our guest and we hope to see you again soon. We are always striving to provide the best service and hospitality to our valued guests like you.
Thank you again for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.
Sincerely,
Xuan Nguyen

The food is great & well priced

The hotel do not have enough sunloungers to cater for everyone, they said they are subject to availability! So we had to get up at 7am everyday to ensure we got 2!! 
Also the music by the pool, in the restaurants, in the lift its just awful, it ruins the vibe and goes from tacky euro pop to awful copies of well known songs.

sample_comments.text: Even it is little far away from center, but it is worth it. Highly recommend

sample_comments.title: Good facilities and wonderful staff, but constant loud, thumping music has put us off coming back!
sample_comments.positives: Room was a decent size, well laid out and beds very comfortable. Breakfast buffet had an excellent choice and was constantly replenished right up until end of service. Location of hotel is quite a distance from anywhere, nothing immediately around hotel but shuttle bus was useful to get to local town/night market (although it was a good 25 minute walk from the drop off point to the night market, I'm not sure why there couldn't be a closer drop off location?). Staff incredibly friendly, polite and helpful. Lots of fun games set up on the beach for kids. Also enjoyed morning yoga and lovely relaxing massage at the spa.
sample_comments.negatives: Sadly I would not be able to recommend this hotel. The music played at every part of the hotel (restaurants, pool, beach bar and around the grounds) was at a level which was too high to relax. I understand that many guests are happy to listen to music, but to have the same beat thumping away by the pool from 8am-10pm every day was just too much. We spent the whole time trying to find sun loungers as far away from the speakers as possible; not easy as the speakers are located at regular intervals all around the pool and the surrounding area. Such a shame that we couldn't relax and enjoy the sounds of nature for at least part of the day! To ensure the environment appeals to all guests, there should be the option of choosing to sit by the pool bar with the loud music, or finding a quieter area.

sample_comments.title: Amazing service, great views, rooms!
sample_comments.text: The hotel is huge with all desired facilities and the staff is amazingly hospitable and friendly. The ocean view rooms offer amazing vista. The breakfast buffet spread was great and caters to all tastes and requests. The grillhouse and beach house are good too. The private beach offers beautiful views and relaxing space though nearby areas could be but more clean. We had a medical emergency while staying and staff were extremely helpful and quick. Will definitely recommend and return.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Arnab
We would like to thank you for sharing details of your recent stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. 
We are truly humbled and could not be happier reading the wonderfully written review. We make every effort to maintain the high standards of quality service delivery we are renowned for and we are delighted that we have been successful in achieving this during your stay. We very much enjoyed reading your succinct review that so beautifully summed up all that is best about Pullman Phu Quoc. I have shared your warm words with the team. They are very happy to read that you have enjoyed the staff efficiency, the "genuine smiles", the ocean view rooms, the food and the relaxing beach. 
Once again, thank you very much for taking the time in writing your feedback. We sincerely hope that you have a speedy recovery and your next visit will be as pleasant as the previous one.
Best regards and safe travels,
Pieter DE WEERD | General Manager
Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.negatives: I understand that Phu Quoc is an emerging resort and cannot be compared to Turkey. However, the basic lack of a sufficient number of sun loungers and towels on the beach and by the pool in such an expensive hotel by Vietnamese standards shows a lack of respect for guests. The housekeeping in the bungalow also leaves much to be desired. Tiled floors should be washed, not swept. And as for the beach, unfortunately the water in this area is not clear.

sample_comments.title: Excellent customer service
sample_comments.text: The spotless resort, excellent customer service, and a good variety of breakfast buffets.

sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: A beautiful resort to look at with some fantastic attributes needs some refinement to make it great.
sample_comments.positives: We loved the pool and the beach. The breakfast selection was fantastic. The main bed in our cabanah was very comfortable, the breakfast service at the mad cow was impeccable
sample_comments.negatives: Well firstly we booked a Cabanah for 2 adults and two children. As well as paying extra for the 4 person occupancy we had to pay more for a sofa bed. I assumed (wrongly) this would be a double bed as my children's ages are 9 and 11 (which the property knew). It was a single sofa that was already in all the other cabanas so hadn't been brought in specially. I felt a bit misled that the room was suitable for 4 people even though it was beautiful, on the 3rd day of our stay my son stepped on glass at the pool area. There should never be glass around a pool area. Another guest mentioned it had broken the day before and not been cleaned up properly which was very disappointing. Around the pool there aren't enough beds. This leads to people putting towels on the beds early in the morning before breakfast. There is now an enforced rule that you can't leave your towel for more than 30 minutes unattended. I understand this rule however the life guards would move the towels and then when an irate guest came back to find someone else on their bed the life guard who didn't speak English did not say he had moved it which caused the irate guest to believe the other guest had moved the towel. Not great communication, the service by the pool was so slow and took around 2 hours some days to get a pizza delivered. On our last day we ordered beef tacos. When they arrived they were cold. I didn't want to create a fuss so said to my husband let's eat them it's fine. Well that was a terrible mistake. We both spent the night vomitting,

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: One of the most beautiful resorts I have ever stayed in, clean ,big, beautifully renovated rooms, huge pool, very very clean, a lots of choices for breakfast...
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: Over priced for what you get and nothing to do outside of the resort.
sample_comments.positives:
Big clean pool and the pool side food was good. 
The staff are pleasant 
Great view of sunset from balcony
Great weather
sample_comments.negatives:
Room smelt damp 
Aircon was not the most effective 
The beach has nowhere near enough sun loungers which all get taken early doors with the classic towel in the morning trick! Sea is dirty. 
The location in south of island is strange as it feels like a ghost town with multiple massive resorts with no community soul, but that is typical of the way phu quoc is being developed unfortunately. The north of the island was much better in my opinion. 
Very expensive room rates for what you get i would have expected 10 times more for the cost.

sample_comments.title: Best accommodations in Phu Quoc
sample_comments.text: Although there are no facilities nearby, it's not a big problem since you can use Grab or a shuttle (for a fee). I wanted to stay in the accommodation the entire time. I chose a garden view, and it was great to go directly to the pool. It's nice to play with the child at the pool while having meals and drinks. The accommodation is very spacious and clean. The breakfast had a lot of variety and was generally tasty. I stayed for two days, and one day they had unlimited mangoes. It's the best accommodation to go with a child.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jay,

Thank you for sharing your lovely feedback. We're delighted to hear that you and your family had such an enjoyable stay with us. It's wonderful to know that you appreciated the spacious, clean room with direct pool access, making it easy to relax and enjoy special moments with your child.

We're also pleased that you enjoyed our breakfast selection and that it added to your overall experience. Your kind words about our family-friendly atmosphere mean a lot to us, and we're so glad Pullman Phu Quoc was the perfect choice for your family getaway.

We truly appreciate your recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back for another memorable stay soon.

Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Supervisor
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives:
The resort is spacious and nicely maintained. It is quiet and pleasant. The beach is very nice and has quiet zones. The rooms are spacious, although quite poorly furnished (no desk, bedside tables or chest of drawers. The bathroom is well-equipped, although the cosmetics are very average. The food is ok, although the staff is not very helpful due to their limited English.

The prices of the hotel and food are very good for a 5* resort, although of course quite high for Vietnam. If you want to relax in a resort, in my opinion this is a good choice in good price.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. From the outside, the hotel building looks depressing.

2. The hotel management is average, many things are done to make it convenient for the employees and not the guests. An example was the notorious early ending of meals, lying to customers so that they don't do something (we don't have any mangoes anymore - although they were cleared away in the back 1 minute earlier and 15 minutes before the end of breakfast). Another example: if you want to drink coffee by the pool - go to the bar. And if you are in the pool bar, go to another bar, etc.
Other examples of negligence include waking up several times (yes!) at 9am to clean the room, and then not cleaning it until 4pm. So either you adapt to service, or you will have a mess in the room. 

3. At 22 the hotel only operates the bar downstairs. If you want to eat something you can use the room service where there are 6 dishes to choose from. Unfortunately there is no "western" food like hamburger or salad. If you have kids - you have a problem.

3. Overall hotel territory seems to be not fit for full booking, cause we had troubles finding sun loungers at both, beach and pool.
4. Even though, I asked for a thorough cleaning in the room, it remained the same

The beachside café is delicious, and the breakfast is just as good. Highly recommended.

Where do I begin? Our stay at the Pullman Phu Quoc was nothing short of exceptional. From the high-end rooms with the bidet toilets to the insanely massive pool, everything exceeded our expectations. sample_comments.negatives: The Resturant was amazing view , food was a bit hit and miss. Some of it was great some not so good.

sample_comments.title: Warm and Family Friendly
sample_comments.text:
We had a wonderful stay at Pullman Phu Quoc. The resort is beautiful, spacious, and very relaxing---perfect for a family getaway. The rooms were clean, modern, and comfortable, with great views and well-maintained facilities.

The staff were friendly, attentive, and always willing to help, which made our stay even more pleasant. The swimming pool were excellent, especially for children, and the overall environment felt safe and peaceful.

Breakfast had a good variety, and the resort amenities were well thought out. Overall, it was a very enjoyable stay, and we would definitely recommend Pullman Phu Quoc to families and couples looking for a relaxing holiday.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel and friendly staff
sample_comments.text:
Nice spacious hotel. Friendly and professional staff. Personally felt it was a bit too big a property, it's a decent walk from room to pool to beach, could have been closer. The configuration of the pool while looking great, to access the washroom you have to walk a big round if on the other side. Rooms wise, I stayed in king premium in one of the further blocks away from the main hotel building. I think it could do with a refresh, some of the fittings, like hangers, vents, room numbers, you can tell are a little worn. Felt thr water pressure in my room could be stronger too. They do provide yellow beach slippers which are helpful. Also try out the pool by the beach club house, I like it as it's quiet, the water is cold and refreshing on a hot day, and there's a DJ there spinning really cool and non mainstream deep house. 

Beach wise, I went in Dec and I found the quality of the sea water to be disappointing. It was murky, you can see your feet, and had these white particles. There's a breakwater that seemed to be building nearby I don't know if that had an effect. 

This trip I had stayed further up north at another 5 star resort and I found the sea water there much clearer and pleasant to swim in. 

It's easy to get cabs from this hotel location and all drivers know it well. To reach the nearest shops it's a distance, not really walkable so that's something to keep in mind. But it adds to the exclusivity of the hotel. 

They provide free shuttle to the airport which is great and the welcome drink, hibiscus tea is really nice I had 2! 

If you get Accor explorer+ you can get 15-30% off food n drinks too. I didn't have it but that was something I learnt while there. 

The gym is ok, not super but doable and in the main building. So if u value Connvenience, then staying in the main building may be helpful though I'm not sure what room types are there in the main building.
