sample_comments.title: Staff & Breakfast were very good, but really overpriced for what you get
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staff. Very good breakfast including coffee. Beautiful, well-kept grounds with palm trees, a large pool, and a very relaxed vibe. Peaceful, remote location. Spacious room with a comfortable bed. Convenient airport shuttle.
sample_comments.negatives: Overpriced, as rest of the island. Air conditioning was noisy, and did not work properly best i could get 25,5C. Constantly musty smell in the room. Too few sunbeds on the beach for such a large resort; many were "reserved" early with towels and left unattended. Restaurants are good but overpriced (common across the island). Shuttle to the city drops off about 1.5 km from the night market and the return time is rushed, with pickup only 2.5 hours later.

sample_comments.title: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Exceptional Stay with Heartfelt Service
sample_comments.text:
From the moment we arrived, the service was nothing short of exceptional. We were warmly welcomed and escorted to the guest lounge, where the team took care of everything seamlessly. Throughout our stay, every staff member was incredibly attentive, always ready to assist with any request or enquiry --- it truly made us feel valued and cared for.

Our room was spotless and beautifully maintained, with thoughtful turn-down service every evening. Everything was exactly as we hoped for --- no disappointment at all.

Dining at the Beach House was another highlight --- the food was simply amazing, beautifully presented, and full of flavour. Although the beach itself may not be the most spectacular, the warmth and professionalism of the staff more than made up for it, turning our stay into something truly memorable.

The best part of our experience was spending time in the Connectivity Lounge and enjoying breakfast at MadCow --- both were absolutely beautiful, offering great ambience and delicious selections. To top it all off, the hotel surprised us with a sweet gesture for our anniversary celebration, which made our stay even more special.

We can't thank the team enough for such an unforgettable experience. Highly recommended for anyone seeking exceptional service and genuine hospitality.
sample_comments.response:
Dear YI-HAN,

Thank you very much for sharing your thoughtful review. We're truly delighted to hear that your stay with us was memorable from the very first moment and felt well cared by our attentive team throughout your visit. We're glad you enjoyed your spotless room, thoughtful turn-down service, and the delightful dining experiences at Beach House, Connectivity Lounge, and Mad Cow. It was an honour to be part of your anniversary celebration, and we're also very happy that the warmth and professionalism of our staff made the difference. We can't wait to welcome back for another unforgettable stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Warm regards,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Decent stay for families!
sample_comments.positives:

Close to sunset town, cable car station 
Beach area is clean
sample_comments.negatives: Kid clubs can be more spacious and more activities for kids around 5-7yo. Rooms are quite dated and not well kept. Just bear in mind - It's in special zone so grab food delivery has surcharges.

sample_comments.negatives: Slightly strange smell in room like a damp. Some things extremely expensive.

- room size & amenities

sample_comments.title: Amazing
sample_comments.text: Everything amazing, we really enjoyed
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Facilities, location, spa Nhu and Nghii

sample_comments.title: Highly Recommend, will be back.
sample_comments.text: Lovely lovely stay, the hotel is well laid out, and large enough for there to be something for everyone. The breakfast was THE BEST hotel breakfast I have ever had in any hotel. It's well worth the extra money. Pool was great, as was the staff. The hotel is walking distance to the beach, and other places to eat. Easy shuttle to shopping and spas. We'll be back!
sample_comments.response: Dear Sonia, thank you for sharing your experience with us. It is wonderful to know that our convenient location to shops, hearty breakfast, spacious swimming pool and well-kept facilities met your expectations. Your compliment is such a great motivation for us to. We can't wait to welcoming you back soon for another wonderful stay. Sincerely, Kim Nguyen, Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast was the best. A wide variety and was delicious.
sample_comments.negatives:
We stayed in a double bedded room. My daughter developed bites on her arms legs and face that looked like bed bugs. Both her and my husband had it from sleeping on one of the same bed.
Something management should look into.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing resort with awesome service oriented staff!
sample_comments.text:
Pullman's service is always as pleasant if you want a relaxing resort stay with no fuss. Buggy service comes in 1 min, replies from concierge is quick. 

Most staff understand some english, and those at the front desk and buggy service are excellent at it.

In room amenities worked great. Breakfast was more than I could eat with a great spread from Western, to Vietnamese.

It's located mid-way between the 2 main tourist spots (Hom Thom and the main town area with the local night market), each of 20min south and north respectively. 

Airport shuttle both ways was perfect and on time, easy to locate.

I thank Pullman for my great stay!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Candela,

Thank you very much for your wonderful feedback. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed a relaxing stay and appreciated our service-oriented team. It is especially rewarding to know that our buggy and concierge services, in-room amenities, and breakfast spread all contributed to a seamless and enjoyable experience.

We are also pleased that our convenient location and airport shuttle service made your travels easy and stress-free. Your kind words mean a lot to our team, and we will be sure to share your compliments with everyone.

We truly look forward to welcoming you back to Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort for another memorable and relaxing stay.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Comfortable resort
sample_comments.positives: Great facilities and comfortable rooms. The sunloungers by the pool were extremely comfortable and it was great to have bikes available to use. Buffet breakfast was sublime, best we've ever had. Our check in experience was unfortunately quite soured by a gentleman that took to immediately abruptly questioning us to sign up to Accor program, without any level of detail on what it was, questioning us about why we did not have a credit card and that using our debit card to make purchases is risky at the hotel. Nothing was explained in any level of detail and left us not confident at all in anything we were responding to. This whole experience left us extremely uncomfortable and honestly quite shaken especially after just arriving in a foreign country. All other staff members were extremely pleasant however for a 5 star resort, staff directly engaging with guests should be able to communicate with basic English. The young gentleman working in the breakfast area, believe his name is Loo, always had the most welcoming smile on his face. He should be commended for how he makes other guests feel. Recommend the resort adds more shuttles to the town.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: My stay at this hotel exceeded all expectations! The room was cozy, the service was excellent, and the atmosphere was very pleasant. The hotel is truly worth the money. I'm already looking forward to coming back!
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Great hotel with beautiful picturesque sunsets
sample_comments.positives: We loved the hotel, the sunsets were amazing, the breakfast was one of the best we ever had, the room was spacious, the beach was really clean and with beautiful white sand. It was very convenient to go from the hotel to any part of the island, the Grab was always 1-2 minutes away.

sample_comments.title: Comfortable hotel
sample_comments.text: We stayed in a room with a pool while traveling with children. The room was spacious, the bathroom and bathtub were also large, and there was a terrace, making it very comfortable. When the hot water wasn't working one night, they kindly provided us with another room. The breakfast buffet had a wide variety of options, and there were seats where you could sit directly or order from the bar by the pool, allowing us to relax while spending time in the hotel. It is a bit far from downtown, but it's about a 15-minute walk to the cable car station, which made it great for a leisurely stay!
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Pullman Phu Quoc is a perfect escape from urban life.
sample_comments.positives:
Pullman Phu Quoc is great.The building is huge,but at same time it's very easy to find out how to reach different facilities.The room I stayed is quite spacious, equipped with everything you need (iron , electric kettle, hair dryer).The bed is more than comfortable.The included breakfast is fantastic with focus on Chinese and Asian customer, nevertheless for me European,the choice of food is fantastic.
Cleanliness outstanding.
There is a fitness room,sauna , massage with a lot of different types of treatments.
Personal very friendly,, always willing to serve you the best and with the smile.Very nice and friendly people.
sample_comments.negatives:
The view from the balcony on surroundings not the most impressive,but it depends on which side it is situated.Next time I will opt for the more sunny/beach side view.
The beach is nice but I will not describe it as tropical paradise.The music : inside and outside is a little bit too loud. As a tourist from Europe I would like to hear not only english music,but the Vietnamese as well.

sample_comments.title: Vacationers
sample_comments.text: Overall is perfect.
sample_comments.response:
Dear kha,

Your wonderful review made our day! We're so glad you enjoyed your time at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. Hope your next visit will be just around the corner.

Cheers,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Awesome
sample_comments.positives:
It was a very quiet place and the beach was walking distance..there is a bar at the pool area and beach house nearby the beach

For anybody booking the cabana rooms, there is 1 million dong credit per night to utilize for food and drinks at the pool side bar, beach house and the bar nearby receptionist..
sample_comments.negatives: Limited food selection and limited tv channels

sample_comments.title: Satisfying everything
sample_comments.text:
Best accommodation
The pool depth is good for adults to play in at 1.4m in the shallow pool. Breakfast offers a variety but is generally on the salty side. The location is a bit inconvenient, so I took a taxi to the night market. While the location is a drawback, there are many advantages that make up for it.
There is an indoor and outdoor kids' room and kids' zone, and the room size is large with very big beds. After check-in and check-out, the pool can still be used, and there is a private beach with a bar along the way that has a restroom and shower, which made for a comfortable departure after check-out!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kim,

Thank you for taking the time to write such a lovely review. We're pleased to know that your stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort was memorable. Your support means so much to us, and we hope to welcome you again soon.

Kind regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Zip-Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent for a short break - you don't need to leave the hotel but there are plenty of options and things to see and do
sample_comments.positives: Great pool and beautiful beach, rooms were very clean and spacious and the food options were excellent. Only 15-20 minutes from the airport.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing comes to mind.

sample_comments.title: Pullman is love
sample_comments.text:
We had a wonderful 4-day stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Resort. Since our honeymoon, we have often stayed at Pullman whenever we traveled to Vietnam and Thailand. After having children and traveling with them, our lifestyle has changed a little. We began to notice the huge amount of waste humans produce, and started to worry more about the future of the Earth where our children will live.

"Little act, big difference." Pullman seems to truly embrace this motto by reducing plastic use, encouraging towel reuse, and taking many steps to protect the environment. We deeply appreciate this value.

In terms of location, the resort is about a 5-minute drive to the Sonasea area, so walking is not very convenient. However, we used the VinBus or the hotel's 5 PM shuttle service to get to downtown or Sonasea for dining and massages.

Breakfast was amazing, especially since there were many Korean guests and the menu included kimchi, kimchi stew, japchae, and more. It perfectly matched our taste. Honestly, breakfast is one of the most important factors for me when choosing a hotel, and here it was absolutely satisfying---from desserts to pho. At the coffee bar, they even served Bloody Mary cocktails for alcohol lovers, which I highly recommend trying.

Our children love tropical fruits, so we checked the VinBus timetable and visited Duong Bao Market near the Sunset Resort, where we bought fresh mangoes for only 30,000 VND per kilogram. They were so delicious and affordable.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Jonghee,

Thank you very much for sharing such a heartfelt review of your recent stay with us. It is truly wonderful to hear that Pullman has been a part of your journeys from your honeymoon to now traveling with your children. Your kind words mean a lot to us.

We are especially grateful for your recognition of our sustainability efforts. At Pullman Phu Quoc, we believe that even small actions can create a meaningful impact, and knowing that our initiatives resonate with you and your family is deeply rewarding.

It is also a pleasure to learn that our breakfast selection, with its mix of local and international flavors, matched your taste and added to the enjoyment of your stay. We will certainly share your kind compliments with our culinary team.

Thank you again for your continued trust in Pullman. We look forward to welcoming you and your family back for many more memorable stays.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Happy
sample_comments.positives: Staff was so helpful and concern. It feels like family with them. I stayed with kids they enjoyed alot due to the efforts made by people who work there

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The property offer excellent facilities including a fantastic pool area and kid-friendly amenities, ensuring a fun experience for all. Cleanliness is top notch and staffs are attentiveness and friendly, making our stay even more enjoyable. Breakfast was delicious with plenty of options. Halal options are available too!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ibrahim,

We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to share your experience at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. 

We are delighted to hear that our facilities, our cleanliness as well as the attentiveness and friendliness of our staff, contributed to a fun and enjoyable experience for your family. We are also glad to know that our delicious breakfast, with a variety of options including halal choices.

Thank you once again and we look forward to welcoming you back soon for another memorable stay at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort.

Sincerely,
Kim Nguyen
Guest Experience Officer
sample_comments.room_type: SUITE, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: All round our family throughly enjoyed our stay at Pullman and would definitely stay there again
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful grounds. Buffet breakfast was fantastic. Staff was great. Dat from help desk and Durong from concierge desk was very helpful and accommodating. Made out stay easier and more enjoying
sample_comments.negatives: If I had to be very picky. The rooms that we occupied had a little bit of a musty smell. I do understand that the humidity level is very high in Phu Quoc and that doesn't help.

sample_comments.title: Great stay !
sample_comments.text: We will have great memories of this hotel. Amazing buffet breakfast, high quality food and great variety. Great rooms, nothing to fault. We booked a few different rooms and could see they were all great. The swimming pool is one of the biggest resort pools I have come across and has a pool bar. The gym was high standard. The kids enjoyed kids club and the small outdoor area. (I just wish they had a games room for older kids). The staff were excellent. On one day they were painting a nearby room and fumes came into our room, but they helped remediate by sending an air purifier to help with the smell. We didn't have a problem the day after that. Highly recommend this hotel.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Linda,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share such a detailed and wonderful review. We are delighted to hear that you and your family had a memorable stay, and that you enjoyed our buffet breakfast, spacious rooms, large pool with pool bar, gym, and kids club.

We also appreciate your understanding regarding the painting work and are glad our team could quickly assist with the air purifier to make your stay comfortable. Your kind words about our staff and overall experience mean a lot to us.

Thank you for your recommendation, and we look forward to welcoming you and your family back to Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort for more memorable moments.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Amazing!
sample_comments.positives: Entire resort was clean and well manicured, staff were incredible, even with a few small issues they resolved them exceptionally well and promptly, I was very impressed concidering the lack of all of the above on the rest of the island, staff were friendly and attentive, always had a smile on their faces and the restaraunt service was impeccable. Coming from Australia I found the quality of street food was extreemly underwhelming but the hotel food was incredible to the point where we would plan our meals around being at the hotel to eat even when we were out exploring the island (definitely try the pulled pork and chilli con carn tacos ). I can't recommend this hotel enough!
sample_comments.negatives: The swim up pool bar is something we always love at a hotel, just a shame it wasn't an infinity pool overlooking the beach so we could be there for the perfect sunset

sample_comments.title: My stay at pullman
sample_comments.text: Location good but no nearby actives near the hotel and no shopping mall near hotel and they don't allow delivery from grab and Boult
sample_comments.response:
Dear Waheed,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We are glad to hear that you found our location convenient. At the same time, we understand your concern regarding the limited nearby activities and shopping options, as well as the restriction on external food deliveries via Grab or Boult.

Please know that these measures are in place to maintain hygiene and safety standards for all our guests, though we understand how it can be inconvenient. Your comments are very valuable, and we will continue exploring ways to enhance convenience and the overall experience for our guests.

We appreciate your understanding and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future.

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Nice location, with a quiet and peaceful beach. It is a very good spot if you want to relax and the staff ensured that we have a very good stay. The breakfast was also good and fresh, with options for everyone.
sample_comments.negatives: I believe that the shuttle schedule may be improved, the times to go to Sunset Town are not the best option if you want to see the show.

sample_comments.title: Delicious and high quality foods
sample_comments.text:
The room is modern, very clean, comfortable and high end design. The ground is well kept. The food is so good and high quality. The staff are friendly and helpful.
 One thing that needs to improve is the shuttle accommodation from airport and into town. We booked with the package that said it included airport transfer but we ended up booking Grab because we didn't want to wait for 3 hours for the hotel transport.
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: We had such an amazing time at the Pullman Resort! Checking in was a breeze, and the rooms were supe
sample_comments.positives: We had such an amazing time at the Pullman Resort! Checking in was a breeze, and the rooms were super clean and looked just like the photos. The property is huge and gorgeous, with a great pool and private beach access---perfect for chilling out. We also loved the bar, the kids' play area, and the restaurant. Plus, the complimentary breakfast had so many options! Highly recommend for a relaxing break

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: The property offers good value for money, with stunning views and a very good breakfast. The amenities and restaurants are top-notch, making it easy to relax and enjoy your time. The staff go above and beyond to ensure a pleasant experience. It is a bit far to all of the other tourist attractions on the island, but if you are just looking for a beautiful place to unwind, it is highly recommended.
sample_comments.room_type: PREMIUM DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Great place
sample_comments.positives: Social facilities, food and of course the beach are very nice. Also, the employees are friendly and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: It may be more affordable in terms of price

sample_comments.title: Perfect Family Getaway!!
sample_comments.text: We travelled with kids and had a wonderful time at the property! The breakfast was over the top with something for everyone! My daughter had amazing time at the kids club. The room service was a bit delayed but apart from that everything was 5 stars and seamless from airport pick up and drop shuttle to the rooms and not to mention the gesture for sending us dark chocolates every evening. The Beach had sand toys to various activities that could be enjoyed on the house and the sunset view from beach club was amazing. Overall we had a wonderful time thanks team pullman phu quoc
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Relaxed and well served by staff.
sample_comments.positives: Very well run. Excellent buffet breakfast that catered for Asian, European and Australian preferences. Grounds and pool area well appointed. Pool lounges very comfortable
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing to comment on.

sample_comments.title: Absolute will come again
sample_comments.text:
We tried several resturants in Pullman resort, and all are great. pool side can also enjoy a variety of food and drink menu in Coconut Bar. Recommended by the staff, we had a great sunset view on Mad Dog with great value of wines and juice (for my kid). Breakfast buffet is surely a highlight, lots of food to choose from, and slightly different everyday. We ordered two rounds of Mango Binsue in Lighthouse and have a great lunch next to the beach in Star House.
The room and facilities are clean and very good, my son had an accident in room and the staff quickly helped us on this difficult time. Definitely will come visit again soon!
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Beautiful family experience
sample_comments.positives:
We stayed at Pullman Phu Quoc for the second time this February as a family with two young children, and overall, our experience once again confirmed why we enjoy this property.

Breakfast

The breakfast is genuinely one of the best on the island. The buffet offers a wide variety of high-quality options, everything is fresh, beautifully presented, and constantly replenished. The service team is attentive and proactive --- coffee arrives quickly, staff guide you to tables, and overall the atmosphere is welcoming and efficient.

Guests also have the option to enjoy breakfast at Mad Cow restaurant for a small additional charge with à la carte options, which is also an excellent experience.

The only minor observation regarding the buffet is something that may actually concern the hotel more than guests: there appears to be limited verification of who enters the breakfast area. On several occasions we noticed individuals who were clearly not hotel guests accessing the buffet. While this did not directly impact our enjoyment, it may be something worth reviewing from an operational perspective.

One small note --- the omelette station staff member (Khoa) sometimes appeared slightly reluctant in his interactions. However, this was an isolated observation, and overall the breakfast team is excellent.

⸻

Family Comfort & Facilities

For families with children, the hotel is very convenient. The pool area is well maintained, the buggy service is fast and efficient, and moving around the property is very comfortable.

The resort grounds are beautifully maintained --- it is clear that a great deal of effort, time, and care is invested in landscaping and overall presentation. The property feels vibrant, well-kept, and thoughtfully designed.

⸻

Beach Experience

The beach itself is wonderful --- clean, spacious, and with a great selection of activities such as jet ski, parasailing, banana boat, kayaking, and nearby massage services.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful resort. So much to do !!!
sample_comments.text: Lovely place. Great pool and things to do. There is a bit of a language barrier but I'm sure that will improve over time
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 2 Single Size Beds, Garden View

sample_comments.title: enjoyed my stay
sample_comments.positives: very good breakfast
sample_comments.negatives: all ok

sample_comments.title: Very good overall
sample_comments.text: Amazing Mango Bingsu
sample_comments.room_type: SUITE, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View

sample_comments.title: Overall, we had wonderful time and staff are very friendly and supportive.
sample_comments.positives: Excellent location, Staff are very friendly, and we had great time.
sample_comments.negatives: none

sample_comments.title: A place I want to go again.
sample_comments.text: I am a university student traveling with a friend! I fell in love with the accommodation after seeing the beautiful pool photos, and indeed, the pool was very pretty and well-maintained. (The staff frequently walked around, scooping floating branches with a net and cleaning here and there.) However, the breakfast was so delicious that when I tried to wear my bikini, my belly ended up sticking out! Definitely try the mango bingsu; it was the tastiest mango I've had among the ones I bought from the market, the street vendor, and the supermarket. The private beach is also beautifully arranged, and you must watch the sunset here. I still can't forget that happy moment. The only downside is the location, which is a bit ambiguous. While it's close to the airport, it's far from downtown, far from VinWonders, and quite a distance from the south, making Grab essential. There's nothing around, not even a supermarket or a pharmacy, just barren land. Of course, if your main goal is a hotel vacation, I highly recommend it. My friend and I talked a lot about wanting to come back around this time next year and wanting to come with family too.
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 2 Single Size Beds, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Staff and facilities. Exceptional departure service
sample_comments.negatives: Salt and pepper

sample_comments.title: Good Resort
sample_comments.text: Good resort, got everything you need in it.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ronnie,

Thank you so much for your kind words! We're so happy to hear that you had a wonderful experience during your stay. It was a pleasure having you, and we hope to see you again soon!

Warm regards,
Duong Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Great
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful hotel, great beach, a real 5-star hotel
sample_comments.negatives: A bit lacking on cleanliness, but that is being very picky. Far too expensive for what you get, which is a common theme among Phu Quoc hotels

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: We booked the Executive room, each day you will have 1m back for spending money at their restaurants. Also, we can go to Executive floor for breakfast and less crowded from ground floor. We travelled with two boys - 5 & 3 and had a nice time at the beach.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your experience at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay in the Executive room and appreciated the benefits like the spending allowance for our restaurants and the quieter breakfast on the Executive floor.

It's wonderful to know that your family, especially your two boys, had a nice time at the beach. We strive to create a welcoming environment for families, and your feedback is greatly appreciated.

We hope to welcome you back for another memorable stay soon!

Best regards,

Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Executive Family Suite, Executive Privilege Pass, 2 Bedrooms, Resort View

sample_comments.title: We loved our stay and the facilities, it's a shame about the sun beds
sample_comments.positives: Amazing breakfast!! Great pool and beach area. Loved the large property, fully booked but did not feel crowded.
sample_comments.negatives: Not enough sun beds. Used a lot of time looking for beds both at the pool and on the beach. Large areas that without any problems could fit In more beds. People put out their towels at 07 in the morning and save the bed throughout the whole day. Poor practice that should be avoided. The cleaning of the room was also a bit poor, a lot of sand still on the floor after the room had been cleaned.

sample_comments.title: Kindness and consideration
sample_comments.text: The swimming pool has both deep and shallow areas, so it's easy to enjoy swimming comfortably with young children. The condition of the cabana room was also good, and we had a comfortable stay. Overall, the staff were very friendly and attentive. When we checked in, a female staff member kindly explained everything to us in a way that we could understand, considering the language barrier. On the day of our checkout, a male staff member noticed our child coughing and kindly provided us with bananas and orange juice, which was truly heartwarming. The staff at the kids' club also played sincerely with the children. I would like to visit again during the dry season.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Yumi,

Thank you for sharing your wonderful experience at Pullman Phu Quoc! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed our pool facilities and found the cabana room comfortable for your stay.

It's heartwarming to know that our staff made such a positive impact on your experience. We take pride in providing attentive and friendly service, and it's lovely to hear about the thoughtful gestures from our team, especially regarding your child's wellbeing.

We're also glad that your child enjoyed the Kids' Club---creating joyful memories for our young guests is very important to us.

Thank you again for your kind words, and we would be delighted to welcome you back during the dry season for another memorable stay!

Warm regards,

Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access

sample_comments.title: Truly amazing. This 1 night stay was actually a continuation from our 3 nights stay here. Due to flight rescheduled, we
sample_comments.positives: Very family friendly and felt more comfortable and easy going. Staffs are all sooooo good, helpful and friendly. Most importantly, they clearly place Halal signage on food served during breakfast and even on the menu page which makes it a plus point for us Muslim to stay here.
sample_comments.negatives: With a super friendly & family friendly hotel culture. Having more engaging outdoor activities for kids and adult will be a plus point.

sample_comments.title: It's great for relaxing!
sample_comments.text: As soon as you arrive, friendly staff greet you. You can get a good pickup from the airport, and the welcome juice is delicious! Early check-in and late check-out were both free thanks to my Accor membership, and they took care of it on the same day. The hotel is close to the airport and the Sonasi night market, but you need to use Grab or a shuttle to get there! Using the hotel's night market shuttle bus and the VinBus allowed me to travel without transportation costs, so I ended up using Grab less than I expected. The breakfast changed a little over the three days I stayed, and the mango bingsu is indeed delicious. You can rent tubes and life jackets in the pool, and boards are also available for free at the beach, making it a great place to have fun! I was able to enjoy a beautiful sunset from my room. It's a hotspot for sunset views.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. Noh,

Thank you for your fantastic review! We're thrilled to hear that you found Pullman Phu Quoc to be a great place for relaxation.

It's wonderful to know that our friendly staff greeted you warmly upon arrival and that you enjoyed the delicious welcome juice. We're also pleased that your Accor membership allowed for both early check-in and late check-out, making your stay even more convenient.

We're glad you appreciated our location and the accessibility to Sonasi Night Market. It's great to hear that you took advantage of our shuttle service, which helps our guests explore the area without extra transportation costs.

Thank you for mentioning the variety in our breakfast offerings during your stay, and we're delighted that you enjoyed the mango bingsu!

Thank you for sharing your thoughts, and we can't wait to welcome you back for another relaxing stay at Pullman Phu Quoc!

Warm regards,

Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: We loved everything. Staff was amazing. Thankyou
sample_comments.positives: Very nice and quality. Hotel noticed our anniversary and suprised us with lovely treats.
sample_comments.negatives: The water smells odd

sample_comments.title: Godly value!!
sample_comments.text: I made a 2-night reservation, and first of all, the person at the lobby was so~~~~~ kind that I felt great as soon as I walked in, and the view and beach were so beautiful that I was really happyㅠ Especially during sunset, the beach was truly artistic, and maybe because it was off-season, there weren't many people, so it was a real healing experienceㅜㅜ I felt like there were many families, so instead, I think my boyfriend and I played like kids with goggles, haha, it was really nice! The mango bingsu sold at the bar in the lobby was truly amazing value and delicious, and I think the price, service, and facilities are incredible value for moneyㅜ They also rent out tubes on a first-come, first-served basis, and actually, I accidentally left a handbag during checkout, but they took care of the lost items very well and thoroughly checked to see if anything was missing, so I was very gratefulㅠ It was a dreamy time~
sample_comments.response:
Dear Our Valued Guest,

Thank you for your wonderful review! We're thrilled to hear that you had such a fantastic experience during your stay at Pullman Phu Quoc.

It's heartwarming to know that our lobby staff made a positive impression on you from the moment you arrived. We strive to provide a warm welcome, and it's great to hear you felt that immediately.

We're delighted that you enjoyed the beautiful views and the serene beach, especially during sunset. The off-season tranquility certainly adds to the healing atmosphere, and it sounds like you and your boyfriend made the most of it---playing like kids is what vacations are all about!

We're glad you loved the mango shaved ice at the lobby bar and found our services to be great value for money. Our team works hard to ensure our facilities and offerings meet the highest standards.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another dreamy stay at Pullman Phu Quoc!

Warm regards,

Xuan Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
sample_comments.room_type: DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: We really enjoyed our stay at Pullman Phu Quoc. The staff were amazing - always friendly and helpful. The food was delicious, everything was clean and comfortable, and the whole place had a very relaxing atmosphere.
sample_comments.negatives: Overall, we liked almost everything. The only thing we didn't enjoy much was the music at the beach bar - it could be more chill and relaxing instead of the club-style and noisy.

sample_comments.title: Nice Beach and Pool
sample_comments.text: Located near to the Phu Quoc Airport and their city center. Most probably want to consider as the last hotel before flying back so you can enjoy the seafood and do some quick shopping at the Duong Don Night Market and King Kong Mart which is adjacent.

sample_comments.title: Best Resort Ever!!
sample_comments.text: Pullman Resort was an hour away from VinWonders and about a 20min motorbike ride to the middle of the island where the locals were. We stayed here for 4 days and 3 nights; it was an amazing experience. They made us feel very special and was accommodating- especially Chi (Bartender from the bar inside the hotel) she made us laugh and was very kind, Dat (Chicken), Khang, and there was another person he worked at the front of the hotel- helping us with transportation to the airport and renting motorbikes! The hospitality was incredible and this was by far the best one we've experienced! We plan to come back with the future with our family and show them the same :) we also stayed in the Cabana which had our own private pool access and was far from the main hotel at all. About a 3 minute walk- we later discovered shortcuts. I'm so happy we stayed here and so thankful of the amazing staff that made our trip very memorable! I would recommended renting the motorbikes, since the hotel was in an area where it wasn't crowded, riding the bikes made it very easy and fun :) we took it to the middle of the island and enjoyed going around trying different foods. Thank you so much Phu Quoc Pullman!
sample_comments.response:
Dear M. Priscilla,

On behalf of the entire team at Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we would like to express our sincere gratitude for choosing our hotel for your recent stay. It was a pleasure to have you as our valued guest, and we are thrilled to hear that you thoroughly enjoyed your time with us. 

We strive to provide exceptional experiences for all our guests, and your positive feedback serves as a testament to our commitment to customer satisfaction. We have shared your kind remarks with our entire team, who take great pride in providing our guests with memorable stays. 

At Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort, we continuously work on enhancing our services and facilities to ensure that every stay exceeds expectations. We appreciate your valuable feedback and will take note of any suggestions you shared to further enhance the guest experience. 

Once again, thank you for choosing to stay at our hotel, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another exceptional stay in the future.

친애하는 Janghwan 님, Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort에 대한 귀하의 의견에 진심으로 감사드립니다. 
긍정적인 피드백을 받는 것은 언제나 즐거운 일입니다. 귀하의 의견을 우리 팀과 공유하겠습니다. 이 피드백이 서비스 품질을 지속적으로 개선하기 위해 노력하는 모든 직원에게 격려가 될 것이라고 확신합니다. 다음 링크에서 TripAdvisor의 다른 여행자와 Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort에서의 훌륭한 경험을 공유할 수 있다면 정말 좋을 것입니다. https://bit.ly/ReviewAtPullmanPhuQuoc 피드백을 공유해 주셔서 다시 한 번 감사 드리며 다음 방문도 이전 방문처럼 즐거운 시간이 되길 바랍니다. 
안부 인사와 안전한 여행
 Pieter DE WEERD | 총책임자 Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort

sample_comments.title: Happy stay with Pullman
sample_comments.positives: Great beach and swimming pool. Bicycles, sup and kayak are available for rental for free. Spacious room with amazing ocean view. You can order extra amenities by scanning the QR code. Delicious breakfast and bingsu(Korean shaved ice) is available to order at the bar. Offer free airport transfers.
sample_comments.negatives:
I had happy stay at Pullman overall.
Check in time takes a bit long (30 minutes)
My room's TV was suddenly on while I was sleeping in the midnight so I don't have good sleep during my stay, I have provided my feedback to Pullaman.
Would be grateful if more shuttle bus can be provided to Sonasea night market (currently one or two)

sample_comments.title: Amazing experience
sample_comments.text:
We have such an amazing experience staying at pullman phu quoc. We choose the premium deluxe room because i personally love ocean view.

We arrived early than the check in time and since it's a low season and we are Accor member we have the priority to check in early. 

I've requested HALAL food because i am muslim. Beyond my expectations the kitchen personally provide HALAL food for us for the buffet breakfast. The f&b staff while i arrived at the restaurant personally show me all the vegetarian food that can be consumed by me & my husband. The chef personally greet me and show me HALAL food that i can consume in the buffet breakfast.

My husband had make a special request for my birthday decorations. Surprisingly they send to my room birthday cake because it's my birthday when i check in. 

Overall i have an amazing experience at pullman.

sample_comments.title: A great hotel for 7 nights ....
sample_comments.positives:
The hotel is overall excellent, especially the staff who make an effort to remember your previous requests for food and drink.
The Mad Cow restaurant whilst a little expensive is amazing, although the wine list is a little hit and miss.
The main restaurant serves a great breakfast and the evening menu is superb..... don't waste your time with the seafood, you will get a much better selection for greater value at the local night market.
Rooms are spacious and well maintained.
Would highly recommend for a 5 to 7 night stay
sample_comments.negatives:
This is a family location, screaming children can become irritating, so if you don't like children ......
Also the hotel is not very close to the local Night Market, you are a 5min Grab ride away and the main night market is 25 to 30mins away

sample_comments.title: Gorgeous resort on a lovely beach.
sample_comments.positives:
Beautiful property with a gorgeous pool and surrounding gardens. 

The food was also very high quality. Mostly, the staff were very attentive.
sample_comments.negatives:
This could so easily have been a 10/10, apart from 2 things.

1. Whilst there the resort was hosting a large corporate event which, on the whole, didn't impact us......... until the last day. Whilst relaxing on our sun-bed on the last day of our stay, the entire contingent of delegates descended onto the beach for a noisy team building event. It was so raucous that one of the delegates came up to me and sincerely apologised for ruining our relaxation. Not his fault at all, but we do feel the guests should have been warned as we felt pushed off the beach. We did message to complain via this app but got no response! 

2. Upon checking out, the collection of bags and getting them to our taxi was something of a mess. We called for help with the cases, but it took so long for anyone to turn up that we started making our own way with the cases before being intercepted half way. Ok, so these things happen, and not the end of the world. So now we checked out and informed the concierge that our taxi was imminent and we would need the cases taking outside. This didn't happen, and the taxi driver had to enter the hotel and push the trolley to load up the cases, very kind of him. I personally feel this all happened because of one particular member of the concierge who was very busy walking around looking busy...... but not actually doing anything than being over dramatic.

This is a bit of a shame as the Pullman is an amazing resort with wonderful staff. We were really happy there other than these 2 things.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text: The scenery is very beautiful, the facilities are relatively new, and the service is OK (except that there are too many people during Tet, which leads to the restaurant being crowded). There is a European who guides the order at breakfast (I don't know which country he is from), and his attitude is not very friendly. I took My kid walked in through the door and he yelled that you can't sit down, you have to register at the desk to sit down. I understand, and I know you are busy, but you can be gentle.

It was a pleasure to have you as our guest and we hope to see you again soon. We are always striving to provide the best service and hospitality to our valued guests like you.
Thank you again for choosing Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort. We look forward to welcoming you back in the near future.
Sincerely,
Xuan Nguyen 
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony

sample_comments.title: Stay in heaven at Phu Quoc
sample_comments.positives:
Great stay at Pullman Phu Quoc in an amazing room (cabana with pool). Everything at the hotel was designed for confort and beauty.
Thé staff was extremly kind and gentle.
The breakfast is very good with a lot of choices.
sample_comments.negatives:
Warning if you book a room with 2 kids (mine are 12 and 10) the termes of the hotel there are : sharing thé same bed !!!
We had to ask an extra bed for the kids, even the bed is 2m large, we can't stand at 4 in this bed.
Book an extra bed while booking.

secondary.description_full:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc: Nơi nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng tại Đảo Phú Quốc

Với 331 phòng nghỉ tiện nghi và dịch vụ 5 sao, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách mong muốn trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Khách sạn nằm cách sân bay chỉ 10 phút đi xe, mang lại sự thuận tiện cho du khách khi di chuyển. Với kiến trúc hiện đại và đẹp mắt, khách sạn đã được xây dựng vào năm 2020, mang đến không gian nghỉ dưỡng mới mẻ và đầy phong cách.

Thời gian nhận phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc là từ 03:00 PM, và thời gian trả phòng là 12:00 PM. Điều này cho phép du khách có đủ thời gian để thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ mà không cần lo lắng về việc trả phòng sớm. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cũng có chính sách đặc biệt cho trẻ em. Trẻ em từ 3 đến 12 tuổi được phép ở miễn phí tại khách sạn, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ khi lựa chọn nơi nghỉ ngơi.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc không chỉ mang đến một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho du khách, mà còn đảm bảo sự thuận tiện và thoải mái trong mọi khía cạnh. Với số lượng phòng nghỉ lên đến 331, khách sạn có đủ không gian để đáp ứng nhu cầu của mọi du khách. Hãy đến và khám phá Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc để trải nghiệm những giây phút thư giãn và tràn đầy niềm vui tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam.

Trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc không chỉ nổi tiếng với vị trí tuyệt đẹp và dịch vụ chất lượng mà còn mang đến những trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời cho du khách. Với quầy bar đẹp mắt, bạn có thể thưởng thức những loại cocktail độc đáo và các loại đồ uống tuyệt vời trong không gian sang trọng và ấm cúng.

Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn cung cấp các tiện ích giải trí khác như bồn tắm nước nóng và phòng xông hơi. Sau một ngày dạo chơi trên bãi biển hay khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, bạn có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng những phút giây thư giãn tại bồn tắm nước nóng hoặc thả mình trong không gian xông hơi thư giãn. Đây là cách tuyệt vời để tái tạo năng lượng và thư giãn cơ thể.

Hơn nữa, khu vườn xanh mướt tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc cũng là một nơi tuyệt vời để tận hưởng những khoảnh khắc yên bình và thư giãn. Bạn có thể dạo chơi trong khu vườn, ngắm nhìn những cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp và thưởng thức không gian tự nhiên tươi mát. Khu vườn cũng là nơi lý tưởng để thực hiện các hoạt động thể dục buổi sáng hoặc thả mình vào những cuốn sách hay.

Tiện nghi thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai yêu thích hoạt động thể thao. Khu vực thể dục của khu nghỉ dưỡng được trang bị đầy đủ và hiện đại, với các máy tập thể dục và trang thiết bị tập luyện chuyên nghiệp. Bạn có thể rèn luyện cơ bắp và duy trì sức khỏe tại đây.

Nếu bạn yêu thích tennis, khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có sân tennis chuyên nghiệp. Bạn có thể tham gia vào trận đấu thể thao thú vị với bạn bè và gia đình hoặc cải thiện kỹ năng của mình với các giáo viên chuyên nghiệp.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng các hoạt động thể thao nước không cần động cơ tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Dạo bước dọc bãi biển riêng tư hoặc tham gia vào các hoạt động như lướt ván, kayak và lặn biển. Bể bơi ngoài trời cũng là lựa chọn tuyệt vời để thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát. Hãy ghé qua quầy bar bên bể bơi hoặc bãi biển để thưởng thức đồ uống tươi mát và thưởng thức cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp của biển.

Tiện ích tiện nghi tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện ích tiện nghi đáng chú ý. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giặt ủi, dịch vụ phòng, két an toàn, lễ tân và Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng cũng như trong tất cả các phòng. Bạn có thể yên tâm sử dụng dịch vụ giặt là và làm khô, tiến hành thủ tục nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh chóng, và để hành lý tại chỗ. Bên cạnh đó, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện lợi cho khách hàng.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách nhiều tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức khi di chuyển đến và đi từ sân bay. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ thuê xe và dịch vụ taxi, giúp du khách dễ dàng khám phá các điểm đến trong khu vực. 

Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng có chỗ đỗ xe tự động và dịch vụ đỗ xe tự phục vụ, đảm bảo sự thuận tiện cho khách hàng có xe riêng. Nếu du khách muốn tham quan các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón và tổ chức các tour du lịch, giúp du khách khám phá những điểm đến thú vị trong khu vực. Với các tiện ích vận chuyển đa dạng như vậy, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá Đảo Phú Quốc.

Những tiện nghi ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc tọa lạc tại Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, không chỉ hấp dẫn du khách bởi vẻ đẹp của bãi biển mà còn bởi những tiện nghi ẩm thực tuyệt vời mà nơi đây mang đến. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, nhà hàng đa dạng món ăn, dịch vụ phòng tiện nghi, nhà bếp chung và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày.

Khách sạn có nhà hàng phục vụ cả ngày lẫn đêm, đảm bảo rằng du khách luôn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon mọi lúc trong ngày. Bữa sáng buffet và bữa sáng kiểu châu Âu cũng được cung cấp hàng ngày để khách có thể khởi đầu ngày mới với những món ăn đa dạng và đầy dinh dưỡng. Ngoài ra, khách cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ phòng để thưởng thức các món ăn tại chính căn phòng của mình hoặc sử dụng nhà bếp chung để tự nấu ăn. Với dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, du khách sẽ luôn được tận hưởng không gian sạch sẽ và gọn gàng trong suốt kỳ nghỉ tại đây.

Phòng nghỉ tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc tại Đảo Phú Quốc cung cấp nhiều loại phòng đa dạng để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Các loại phòng bao gồm: Cabana 1 giường King Size có tiếp cận hồ bơi, Suite Deluxe với quyền truy cập vào phòng Lounge, Deluxe Garden View King Room với ban công, Deluxe Room với 2 giường đơn, Deluxe Room với 2 giường đơn và tầm nhìn ra biển, Premium Deluxe Room với giường King Size và tầm nhìn ra biển, Premium Family Room với 2 phòng ngủ và tầm nhìn ra khu nghỉ dưỡng, Suite Lounge Access với giường King Size và tầm nhìn ra biển, Superior Room với 2 giường đơn và ban công, Superior Room với 2 giường Zip-Beds và ban công. 

Đặt phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc thông qua Agoda sẽ mang lại cho bạn những lợi ích tuyệt vời như giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối. Agoda cam kết cung cấp cho khách hàng giá phòng hấp dẫn và đảm bảo rằng quá trình đặt phòng trên Agoda sẽ diễn ra một cách thuận lợi và không gây phiền toái.

Dương Tơ - Nơi tuyệt vời để khám phá ở Đảo Phú Quốc

Dương Tơ là một trong những điểm đến hấp dẫn nhất ở Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam. Với bãi biển trải dài và cát trắng mịn, Dương Tơ là một thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng cho những ai yêu thích biển cả và nắng ấm. Khách sạn Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc nằm tại Dương Tơ, mang đến cho du khách trải nghiệm tuyệt vời với không gian xanh mát, tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp.

Không chỉ là một điểm đến nghỉ dưỡng, Dương Tơ còn có nhiều hoạt động thú vị để khám phá. Du khách có thể tham gia các tour du lịch khám phá rừng nguyên sinh, tham quan các vườn cây trái và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao ngoài trời như lướt ván, lặn biển và đi xe đạp. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều nhà hàng, quán bar và cửa hàng mua sắm để du khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sản địa phương và mua sắm các sản phẩm độc đáo.

Dương Tơ là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian biển cả tuyệt đẹp và trải nghiệm văn hóa đặc trưng của Đảo Phú Quốc. Với khách sạn Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc nằm tại đây, du khách sẽ có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ với các tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp.

Hướng dẫn đi từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc nằm ở Dương Tơ, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam, và có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận từ các sân bay gần Đảo Phú Quốc. Có hai sân bay chính phục vụ khu vực này là Sân bay Quốc tế Phú Quốc (PQC) và Sân bay Quốc tế Rạch Giá (VKG).

Nếu bạn bay đến Sân bay Quốc tế Phú Quốc (PQC), có một số phương tiện để bạn chọn để đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc. Một trong những phương tiện phổ biến nhất là taxi. Bạn có thể tìm các dịch vụ taxi chính thức tại sân bay hoặc đặt trước qua điện thoại. Điều này sẽ đảm bảo rằng bạn sẽ có một phương tiện an toàn và thuận tiện để đến đích. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể thuê xe máy hoặc xe ô tô tại sân bay để tự lái đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc.

Nếu bạn bay đến Sân bay Quốc tế Rạch Giá (VKG), bạn cũng có thể dễ dàng di chuyển đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc. Từ sân bay, bạn có thể đi bằng taxi hoặc xe ô tô thuê để đến cảng Rạch Giá. Tại cảng, có nhiều tàu cao tốc và tàu phà đưa bạn đến Đảo Phú Quốc. Khi đến Đảo Phú Quốc, bạn có thể sử dụng các dịch vụ taxi hoặc xe ô tô thuê để đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc.

Dù bạn bay đến Sân bay Quốc tế Phú Quốc (PQC) hay Sân bay Quốc tế Rạch Giá (VKG), việc di chuyển đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc rất thuận tiện và dễ dàng. Bạn sẽ có cơ hội tận hưởng những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng này ở Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng. Du khách có thể thưởng thức ẩm thực Hàn Quốc tại Le Seoul by SikGaek hoặc thưởng thức các món Ý tại Ricordo Restaurant. Okei Bistro cung cấp các món ăn Âu và Á, trong khi INK 360 Rooftop Bar là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức cocktail và ngắm cảnh phong cảnh đẹp. Du khách cũng có thể thưởng thức đồ uống tại 66 PARIS COFFEE TEA HOUSE hoặc thưởng thức ẩm thực Việt Nam tại NO1| NGON OTTO - Vietnamese Cuisine & Seafood Restaurant. Shack là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức đồ uống và thức ăn nhẹ, trong khi Mad Cow Wine & Grill là điểm đến cho các món ăn nướng và rượu vang. Ocean Club - Regent Phu Quoc cung cấp các món ăn hải sản tươi ngon, và Salt 'n' Pepper Restaurant là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức các món ăn quốc tế.

Giá trung bình một phòng ở Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc

Với giá trung bình một phòng là $175, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc đang nằm trong phân khúc cao cấp của thị trường khách sạn tại Đảo Phú Quốc. So với giá trung bình một phòng khách sạn ở Đảo Phú Quốc là $75, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đích thực với dịch vụ và tiện nghi tuyệt vời.

Với giá trung bình cao hơn, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc cung cấp cho khách hàng không chỉ những phòng nghỉ sang trọng và tiện nghi hiện đại, mà còn có các tiện ích cao cấp như hồ bơi, nhà hàng, quầy bar, spa, và trung tâm thể dục. Khách sạn này cũng nằm trong khu vực gần biển, cho phép du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận và tận hưởng không gian biển tuyệt đẹp. Với sự kết hợp hoàn hảo giữa giá trị và chất lượng, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những ai mong muốn có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đảo Phú Quốc.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời với dịch vụ tuyệt hảo

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với dịch vụ tuyệt hảo và thân thiện. Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình, luôn sẵn lòng giúp đỡ. Hồ bơi tuyệt đẹp và tạo cảm giác thư giãn tuyệt vời. Dịch vụ tại đây rất tốt, bãi biển đẹp và thực đơn đa dạng. Khu vườn, hồ bơi và bãi biển đều trông như trong hình ảnh, tạo nên một không gian tuyệt đẹp và thú vị. Đây là một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ 4 đêm tuyệt vời ở đây và chắc chắn sẽ quay lại cho chuyến đi tiếp theo. Khách sạn thực sự tốt để lưu trú và ấn tượng với sự hiếu khách của nhân viên. Khu nghỉ dưỡng nằm tại bãi biển dài với hoàng hôn tuyệt đẹp hàng ngày.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc: Nơi lý tưởng để trải nghiệm những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Pullman Phú Quốc ở Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Với tổng điểm đánh giá 9.1/10, khách hàng đã khẳng định rằng đây là một trong những nơi lưu trú tốt nhất trên hòn đảo này.

Khách hàng đánh giá cao giá trị của khu nghỉ dưỡng này với điểm số 9.0/10. Với các dịch vụ và tiện nghi tuyệt vời, khách hàng cảm thấy rằng giá cả phù hợp với những gì mà họ nhận được. Điều này cho phép du khách có thể trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ sang trọng và thoải mái mà không cần lo lắng về giá cả.

Khách hàng cũng ghi nhận về sự sạch sẽ và tiện nghi của khu nghỉ dưỡng với điểm số 9.2/10. Với những căn phòng rộng rãi và thiết kế hiện đại, khách hàng có thể tận hưởng không gian sống thoải mái và tiện nghi. Đội ngũ nhân viên cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm số 9.4/10 về hiệu suất làm việc. Với sự nhiệt tình, chuyên nghiệp và thân thiện, nhân viên của khu nghỉ dưỡng sẽ làm hài lòng mọi khách hàng và đảm bảo rằng họ có một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời.

faq.question: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) có quán bar trong khuôn viên không?
faq.answer: Nhâm nhi đồ uống yêu thích của quý khách tại bar ở Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc. Khách có thể thưởng thức các loại đồ uống khác tại bar cạnh hồ bơi vào những ngày nóng nực hoặc tận hưởng buổi tối sôi động tại câu lạc bộ đêm.

faq.question: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay không?
faq.answer: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay cho miễn phí theo yêu cầu! Quý khách có thể phải thanh toán một khoản phụ thu. Để yêu cầu, chỉ cần đánh dấu vào ô trống trong phiếu đặt phòng, ngay trước khi thanh toán.

faq.question: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) có bể bơi không?
faq.answer: Trong thời gian lưu trú tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc, quý khách có thể bắt đầu ngày mới bằng cách nhảy ùm xuống làn nước mát của bể bơi tại cơ sở lưu trú hoặc chỉ đơn giản là nằm thư giãn bên bể bơi sau một ngày dài khám phá.

faq.question: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) có dịch vụ giặt khô không?
faq.answer: Có! Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc cung cấp dịch vụ giặt khô và có thể được yêu cầu trong suốt kỳ lưu trú để đảm bảo quý khách luôn được diện bộ trang phục yêu thích mình của mình. Vui lòng liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú để biết thêm thông tin.

faq.question: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) có bãi đỗ xe không?
faq.answer: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc có bãi đỗ xe trong khuôn viên miễn phí để khách sử dụng phương tiện riêng có thể chọn khi nghỉ tại cơ sở lưu trú này. Trong trường hợp bãi đỗ xe hết chỗ, cơ sở lưu trú cũng có và lân cận. Vui lòng liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú để biết thêm thông tin hoặc đăng nhập vào tài khoản Agoda và liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú thông qua hộp trò chuyện nhắn tin trực tiếp của Agoda.

faq.question: Tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort), khách thường lưu trú trong bao lâu?
faq.answer: Khách trước đây đã được xác thực lưu trú tạiKhu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc có thời gian lưu trú trung bình mỗi đêm là 3 đêm tại cơ sở lưu trú này.

faq.question: Điều gì ở Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) được khách yêu thích nhất?
faq.answer: Khách đã xác thực lưu trú tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc đã đánh giá 9.299 cho cơ sở lưu trú này vì service hiếm có như là điểm nhấn chính cho kỳ lưu trú của họ.

faq.question: Mức độ hài lòng trong bài đánh giá của khách về giường ngủ tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort)?
faq.answer: 100.0% bài đánh giá từ khách đã xác thực đã đưa ra nhận xét và phản hồi tích cực về giường ngủ tại cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét về Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Điểm trung bình từ khách doanh nhân dành cho Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort)
faq.answer: 8.4 là điểm số trung bình của khách doanh nhân trước đây đã nghỉ tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc đánh giá cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét bằng cách lọc theo đối tượng khách đã được xác thực ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Du khách nội địa nghĩ gì về Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort)?
faq.answer: Du khách nội địa đã từng ở tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc đánh giá trung bình 9.2 cho cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét về cơ sở lưu trú này ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Sân bay gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) nhất
faq.answer: Sân bay gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc nhất là Sân bay Quốc Tế Phú Quốc, cách 5.0 km.

embedding_text:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng Pullman Phú Quốc (Pullman Phu Quoc Beach Resort) - khách sạn 5.0 sao tại Đảo Phú Quốc.
Địa chỉ: Group 6, Ban Quy Hamlet, Duong Bao Area, Dương Tơ, Đảo Phú Quốc, Việt Nam.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Dương Tơ của Đảo Phú Quốc, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 5 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi ngoài trời, bồn tắm nước nóng và xông khô ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Ban công/sân hiên, Bàn là quần, Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi biển riêng, Bãi đỗ xe [gần bên], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe [tại chỗ], Bãi đỗ xe đạp, Bình chữa cháy, Bơi với ống thở, Bơi xuồng, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bể bơi [ngoài trời], Bệnh xá, Bồn ngâm chân, Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bộ dao nĩa cho trẻ, Bộ hoạt động, Bộ kim chỉ, Bữa sáng, Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa sáng gọi món, Bữa sáng kiểu Tây, Bữa sáng kiểu Á, Bữa sáng trong phòng, Bữa sáng đầy đủ kiểu Mỹ.
Điểm đánh giá 8.8/10 dựa trên 5287 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Bể bơi, Bữa sáng, Độ sạch sẽ, Địa điểm, Bãi biển, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Gia đình.
Các loại phòng: CABANA, Executive Privilege Pass, 1 King Size Bed, Pool Access; Premium Family Suite, Executive Privilege Pass, 2 Bedrooms, Resort View; Phòng Loại Sang, 2 Giường Đơn, Hướng Đại Dương (Deluxe Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Ocean View); Two-Bedroom Pool Villa with Ocean View and Executive Privilege Pass; Executive Family Suite, Executive Privilege Pass, 2 Bedrooms, Resort View; PREMIUM DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Ocean View; Phòng Cao Cấp, 2 Giường Đơn, Ban Công (Superior Room, 2 Single Size Beds, Balcony); DELUXE ROOM, 1 King Size Bed, Garden View.
Gần: Long Beach, Quán bar trên mái INK 360, Farmers' Market, Sunset Sanato Beach Club, Siêu thị T Mart, Trang trại ngọc trai Phú Quốc.
